congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A COMMUNITY FITNESS CENTER IN EVERY BARANGAY NATIONWIDE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to establish community fitness center in every barangay nationwide which will serve as a venue for physical fitness, wellness program and sports activities of all the residents of the barangay.

name: HBN-00059
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PHILIPPINE BOXING COMMISSION THEREBY STRENGTHENING THE COUNTRY'S STANDING IN BOXING SPORTS, ENSURING THE WELFARE OF FILIPINO BOXERS, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Establishes the Philippine Boxing Commission which will focus and steer the skills and talents of the youth towards its proper direction, to provide and implement the necessary safety standards in every boxing match and to provide and implement all necessary welfare incentives and benefits due to all professional boxers who had brought honor and prestige to the country.

name: HBN-00060
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A TERTIARY PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL IN THE PROVINCE OF SARANGANI TO BE KNOWN AS THE SARANGANI PROVINCIAL HOSPITAL, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00061
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF BREAST CARE CENTERS IN EVERY REGION NATIONWIDE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Establishes breast cancer centers in every region nationwide which will spearhead a sustained information campaign to raise the public´s level of awareness on breast cancer, take the lead in providing affordable services in the fight and cure of the disease, and coordinate with the Department of Education to ensure that the ills, causes and symptoms of the disease are regularly discussed as part of the high school curriculum.

name: HBN-00062
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REGULATE THE IMPORTATION, MANUFACTURE, SALE AND DISTRIBUTION OF CHILDREN'S TOYS, SCHOOL SUPPLIES, CHILDCARE ARTICLES AND OTHER RELATED PRODUCTS CONTAINING TOXIC CHEMICALS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Regulates the importation, manufacture, sale and distribution of children´s toys, school supplies, childcare articles and other related products containing toxic chemicals.

name: HBN-00063
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE STEM CELL CENTER OF THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Creates a stem cell research and storage center which will intensify human stem cell research on medical interventions that are evidence-based under an effective food and drug regulatory system that will undertake health manpower for research and development responsive to the country´s health needs and problems essential for national development and progress.

name: HBN-00064
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING PRE-EMPLOYMENT PRIVILEGE TO INDIGENTS BY GRANTING A DISCOUNT ON FEES IN SECURING PRE-EMPLOYMENT CERTIFICATIONS AND CLEARANCES FROM GOVERNMENT AGENCIES
congress_website_abstract: Entitles every indigent job applicant a discount on all fees charged by government agencies in processing the required documents for employment purposes.

name: HBN-00065
congress_website_title: AN ACT REMOVING THE AUTHORITY OF THE SANGGUNIANG PANLALAWIGAN AND SANGGUNIANG PANGLUNSOD TO CREATE BARANGAYS AND GRANTING INTERNAL REVENUE ALLOTMENTS TO BARANGAYS CREATED BY SAID LOCAL SANGGUNIANS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 6 AND 285 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Aims to put an end to the practice of some local government units (LGUs) to create new barangays without considering the financial capability of these barangays because under the present law, they are not entitled to receive an internal revenue allotment (IRA).

name: HBN-00066
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE MANDATORY DISCLOSURE AND DISPLAY OF NUTRITIONAL CONTENT INFORMATION OF FOOD ON THE MENUS AND MENU BOARDS OF RESTAURANTS AND FAST FOOD CHAIN ESTABLISHMENTS AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOR
congress_website_abstract: Requires all restaurants and fast food chain establishments nationwide to disclose and display the nutrient contain information of each standard menu item in their menus and menu boards as usually prepared and sold to the public.

name: HBN-00067
title: DAVAO REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER
long_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE DAVAO REGIONAL HOSPITAL INTO DAVAO REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER, INCREASING ITS BED CAPACITY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5702, AS AMENDED
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE DAVAO REGIONAL HOSPITAL INTO DAVAO REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER, INCREASING ITS BED CAPACITY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7179

name: HBN-00068
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE TAGUM CITY - STO. TOMAS ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL NORTE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00069
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE HEALTHY LIFESTYLE OFFICE UNDER THE DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Establishes the Healthy Lifestyle Office under the Department of Health (DOH) which is tasked to coordinate efforts of all health entities, both private and public, in order to prevent and remedy health related problems as well as to ensure that all citizens are educated on the various serious health risks that affect the populace.

name: HBN-00070
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING PRIORITY TO THE IMMEDIATE DESCENDANT OF DISTRESSED OVERSEAS FILIPINO WORKERS IN THE AVAILMENT OF CONGRESSIONAL MIGRANT WORKERS SCHOLARSHIP FUND, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8042, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'MIGRANT WORKERS AND OVERSEAS FILIPINOS ACT OF 1995' AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to prioritize the immediate descendant of a distressed overseas Filipino worker in the availment of the Migrant Workers Scholarship Fund which was created under Republic Act No. 8042, and use it for the college scholarship of at least one of its dependent children.

name: HBN-00071
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE OPEN TECHNICAL-VOCATIONAL SCHOOL SYSTEM IN THE COUNTRY AND APPROPRIATING FUNS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Provides alternative means of addressing our present problem in education through the institutionalization of the Open Technical-Vocational School System thereby providing flexible educational opportunities for the out-of-school-youths, unemployed, underemployed or differently-abled youths through the access of internet.

name: HBN-00072
congress_website_title: AN ACT EARMARKING THE ENTIRE PHILIPPINE CHARITY SWEEPSTAKES OFFICE (PCSO) CHARITY FUND FOR UNIVERSAL HEALTH CARE COVERAGE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES, THEREBY AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1169, AS AMENDED BY BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 42
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to earmark the Charity Fund for the National Health Insurance Program administered by PhilHealth to ensure the achievement of universal health insurance coverage to be used as contributions to form part of special purpose fund for the counterpart shares of the National Government and Local Government, to be included in the General Appropriations Act.

name: HBN-00073
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR FREE AND MANDATORY ANNUAL PHYSICAL EXAMINATION AND OTHER MEDICAL-RELATED PRIVILEGES TO SENIOR CITIZENS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7432, AS AMENDED, ENTITLED, 'AN ACT TO MAXIMIZE THE CONTRIBUTION OF SENIOR CITIZENS TO NATION BUILDING, GRANT BENEFITS AND SPECIAL PRIVILEGES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES'
congress_website_abstract: Provides free and mandatory annual physical examination and other medical-related privileges to all senior citizens.

name: HBN-00074
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING THE BENEFIT PACKAGE OF THE NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE PROGRAM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7875, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'NATIONAL INSURANCE ACT OF 1995,' AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: Expands the program coverage of the PhilHealth benefit package to include health services such as annual physical check-up, outpatient consultation, dental and optometric service thus giving bigger health care coverage.

name: HBN-00075
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A DISTRICT SKILLS AND TRAINING CENTER FOR OUT-OF SCHOOL YOUTH IN THE FIRST DISTRICT OF DAVAO DEL NORTE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00076
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING ACCREDITED BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS COMPULSORY COVERAGE UNDER THE NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE PROGRAM AND GOVERNMENT SERVICE INSURANCE SYSTEM, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7883, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS' BENEFITS AND INCENTIVES ACT OF 1995,' AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides additional benefits to Barangay Health Workers (BHWs) to include compulsory coverage under the PhilHealth and the GSIS thereby expanding and increasing the benefits they are currently receiving.

name: HBN-00077
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL CENTER FOR MISSING CHILDREN AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Establishes a National Center for Missing Children which shall be tasked to provide information and coordinate public and private initiatives towards reuniting missing children with their families.

name: HBN-00078
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING ADDITIONAL BENEFITS AND PRIVILEGES TO SENIOR CITIZENS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7432, AS AMENDED, ENTITLED ' AN ACT TO MAXIMIZE THE CONTRIBUTION OF SENIOR CITIZENS TO NATION-BUILDING, GRANT BENEFITS AND SPECIAL PRIVILEGES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides additional benefits to senior citizens by granting them discounted payments on court fees, legal services and attorney´s fees in criminal, civil and administrative cases.

name: HBN-00079
congress_website_title: AN ACT ENHANCING THE TOURISM INDUSTRY BY PROMOTING VOLUNTEER TOURISM (VOLUN-TOURISM) IN THE PHILIPPINES AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Defines “volun-tourism” as a new concept in the travel industry wherein people are given the opportunity to travel, enjoy and at the same time involve themselves in a worthy and charitable cause - a reciprocity for a balance mix of service and tourism-related activity.

name: HBN-00080
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE FULL IMPLEMENTATION OF THE USE OF ELECTRONIC DOCUMENTS AND SIGNATURES IN GOVERNMENT TRANSACTIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED 8792, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'ELECTRONIC COMMERCE ACT OF 2000'
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to fully implement the use of electronic documents and signatures in government transactions and to require the government agencies to submit annual status report to the congressional oversight committee to unsure compliance of the mandate of the law.

name: HBN-00081
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING ALL PUBLIC UTILITY VEHICLE OPERATORS TO SECURE COMPULSORY COMPREHENSIVE COVERAGE FOR THEIR MOTOR VEHICLES AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Requires all operators of public transport services to secure comprehensive insurance coverage for their public utility vehicles to protect victims of vehicular accidents and themselves from the high cost of damages, repairs and liability payments incurred because of collision, fire or theft.

name: HBN-00082
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING NOVEMBER 28 OF EVERY YEAR AS THE FOUNDATION DAY OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF SANTA MARGARITA AND A SPECIAL NON-WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY

name: HBN-00083
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING OCTOBER 16 OF EVERY YEAR AS CALBAYOG CITY CHARTER DAY AND A SPECIAL NON-WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY

name: HBN-00084
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING REFORMS IN REAL PROPERTY VALUATION AND ASSESSMENT IN THE PHILIPPINES, REORGANIZING THE BUREAU OF LOCAL GOVERNMENT FINANCE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to build an equitable, transparent, and impartial valuation system to stimulate a vibrant real property sector and foster private investors´ confidence and the general public.

name: HBN-00085
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE EQUAL PARTNERSHIP OF BOTH WIFE AND HUSBAND IN FAMILY AFFAIRS, FURTHER AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE ARTICLES 14, 96, 124, 211, AND 225 OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 209, SERIES OF 1987, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FAMILY CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: Corrects the glaring inequality between women and men, especially on matters pertaining to the management and administration of family affairs, by amending certain provisions in the Family Code.

name: HBN-00086
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A COMPREHENSIVE HAZARDOUS AND RADIOACTIVE WASTES MANAGEMENT, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00087
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING REFORMS IN THE GOVERNMENT'S DRIVE AGAINST PROFESSIONAL SQUATTERS AND SQUATTING RACKETEER/S OR SYNDICATES, STRENGTHENING THE MECHANISMS THEREFOR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7279, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Reinforces the government´s drive against professional squatters and squatting racketeer/s or syndicates and strengthens the mechanisms to effectively curtail their wicked activities, the usual victims of which are the legitimate urban poor beneficiaries.

name: HBN-00088
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING THE MECHANISMS TO FACILITATE THE DISPOSITION OF GOVERNMENT-OWNED LANDS FOR SOCIALIZED HOUSING
congress_website_abstract: Identifies and declares all disposable government lands which have remained idle and suitable for residential purposes and develop the same into socialized housing sites for low-salaried government and private employees and informal settlers as well.

name: HBN-00089
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO AMEND SECTIONS 18 AND 21 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7279, ENTITLED 'AN ACT TO PROVIDE FOR A COMPREHENSIVE AND CONTINUING URBAN DEVELOPMENT AND HOUSING PROGRAM, ESTABLISH THE MECHANISM FOR ITS IMPLEMENTATION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES,' OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'URBAN DEVELOPMENT AND HOUSING ACT OF 1992', TO INCLUDE THE CONSTRUCTION OF EDUCATION FACILITIES AS AN ALTERNATIVE COMPLIANCE TO THE BALANCED HOUSING DEVELOPMENT
congress_website_abstract: Amends the balanced housing development system under the Urban Development and Housing Act to include the provision of educational facilities as an alternative compliance to the provisions.

name: HBN-00090
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE MAGNA CARTA FOR BARANGAYS
congress_website_abstract: Considers barangay officials as regular government employees with fixed salaries, allowances and other fringe benefits, including retirement benefits regular government employees are entitled to; and provides every barangay with basic priorities such as regular supply of clean and potable water, transport services, schools, health centers and barangay halls.

name: HBN-00091
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PHILIPPINE THOROUGHBRED HORSERACING AUTHORITY, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Addresses the much needed legislation which will respond to the demands of the thoroughbred horse racing industry as a revenue and employment provider for the country as well as to the industry stakeholders.

name: HBN-00092
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING THE TAX ON WINNINGS, AND DOCUMENTARY STAMP TAX ON HORSE RACING, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 126 AND 190 OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED, SECTIONS 11 AND 13 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8407 AND SECTIONS 8 AND 10 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7953
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to rationalize the tax on winnings and documentary stamp tax on horse racing in order to encourage wider public participation and increase the number of potential stakeholders.

name: HBN-00093
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE PHILIPPINE PUBLIC SAFETY COLLEGE SYSTEM AS THE PREMIER EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTION FOR TRAINING, HUMAN RESOURCE DEVELOPMENT AND CONTINUING EDUCATION OF ALL POLICE, FIRE AND JAIL PERSONNEL, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Creates Philippine Public Safety College as the premier educational institution for the training, human resource development and continuing education of all personnel of the Philippine National Police (PNP), Bureau of Fire Protection (BFP) and the Bureau of Jail Management and Penology (BJMP).

name: HBN-00094
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPLEMENTING THE RIGHT OF THE PEOPLE TO INFORMATION ON MATTERS OF PUBLIC CONCERN GUARANTEED UNDER SECTION SEVEN, ARTICLE THREE OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION AND THE STATE POLICY OF FULL PUBLIC DISCLOSURE OF ALL ITS TRANSACTIONS INVOLVING PUBLIC INTEREST UNDER SECTION TWENTY-EIGHT, ARTICLE TWO OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Recognizes the right of the people to information on matters of public concern, access to official records, and to documents and papers pertaining to official acts, transactions or decisions, as well as to government research data used as basis for policy development.

name: HBN-00095
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROTECT, CONSERVE, UTILIZE, DEVELOP AND SUSTAINABLY MANAGE FOREST RESOURCES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00096
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONSOLIDATING ADMIRALTY AND MARITIME LAWS, UPDATING RULES IN NAVIGATION, SAFETY STANDARDS AND MARITIME PRACTICES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00097
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE INDIGENOUS PEOPLES SCHOLARSHIP PROGRAM AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Mandates the National Commission on Indigenous Peoples (NCIP) to promulgate rules and regulations for an effective nationwide scholarship program for Indigenous Peoples.

name: HBN-00098
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INCLUDE ETHNIC ORIGIN IN THE NATIONAL SURVEY CONDUCTED BY THE NATIONAL STATISTICS OFFICE
congress_website_abstract: Mandates for the conduct of a national survey to determine every person´s ethnic origin thus helping the government to properly determine and formulate its plans for IPs throughout the country.

name: HBN-00099
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PREVENT AND CONTROL POLLUTION FROM SHIPS, PROVIDE PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Addresses the immediate and comprehensive rehabilitation of marine environment damage as brought about by ships by providing for an institutionalized mechanism for environmental guarantee to finance the needs for emergency response, clean-up or rehabilitation of areas that may be damaged.

name: HBN-00100
congress_website_title: AN ACT HONORING AND GRANTING ADDITIONAL BENEFITS AND PRIVILEGES TO FILIPINO CENTENARIANS, DECLARING THE 25TH OF SEPTEMBER AS NATIONAL RESPECT FOR CENTENARIANS DAY, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Honors and provides incentives to all Filipino centenarian by giving them on their 100th birthday a letter of felicitation from the President of the Philippines for their longevity as well as plaque of recognition from their city or municipality and a Centenarian´s incentive of One Hundred Thousand Pesos (P100,000.00) from the national government and a cash gift from their local government.

name: HBN-00101
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING MERCHANDISING STORES AND SERVICE ESTABLISHMENTS FROM CHARGING MORE THAN THE CASH RETAIL PRICE OF GOODS AND SERVICES PURCHASED WITH CREDIT CARDS AND PRESCRIBING PENALTIES FOR ANY VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Declares it unlawful for any merchandising store or service establishment to charge the customers more than the actual cash retail price of goods and services purchased when such purchase is done with the use of a credit card and/or to limit bargain sale items and services to cash purchase.

name: HBN-00102
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MAGNA CARTA OF STUDENTS
congress_website_abstract: Respects, protects and fulfills the rights of students in the secondary, post-secondary, graduate and port-graduate courses.

name: HBN-00103
title: CITY OF BACOOR ANNIVERSARY
long_title: AN ACT DECLARING JUNE 23 OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF BACOOR TO COMMEMORATE ITS ANNIVERSARY AS A CITY
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING JUNE 23 OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF BACOOR TO COMMEMORATE ITS ANNIVERSARY AS A CITY

name: HBN-00104
congress_website_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE SCHOOL CALENDAR FROM JUNE TO MARCH TO SEPTEMBER TO MAY
congress_website_abstract: Changes the current school calendar to September to March not only to adapt to climate change but to take into account also the long Christmas celebrations in the country so that student will be safer and will be able attend and absorb more during school days.

name: HBN-00105
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMOTING A COMPREHENSIVE PROGRAM ON BREASTFEEDING PRACTICES AND REGULATING THE TRADE, MARKETING AND PROMOTIONS OF CERTAIN FOODS FOR INFANTS AND YOUNG CHILDREN
congress_website_abstract: Promotes breastfeeding as the best possible source of safe and adequate food and nutrition for infants and young children.

name: HBN-00106
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE PRODUCTION, IMPORTATION, SALE, PROVISION, USE, RECOVERY, COLLECTION, RECYCLING AND DISPOSAL OF PLASTIC BAGS
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to minimize, if not totally ban, the use of plastic products in order to preserve the ecological balance and help prevent the destruction of our ecosystem.

name: HBN-00107
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BACOOR NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL-VILLA MARIA ANNEX IN BARANGAY MOLINO II, CITY OF BACOOR, PROVINCE OF CAVITE INTO THE BACOOR NATIONAL SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL-VILLA MARIA ANNEX SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS THE BACOOR NATIONAL SCIENCE HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00108
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A NATIONAL LAND USE AND MANAGEMENT POLICY, PROVIDING THE IMPLEMENTING MECHANISMS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Institutionalizes the land use and physical planning as a mechanism for identifying, determining, and evaluating appropriate land use and allocation patterns.

name: HBN-00109
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REFORM AND STRENGTHEN THE SANGGUNIANG KABATAAN (SK), AMENDING FOR THAT PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Empowers the Katipunan ng mga Kabataan to give the body oversight powers to make Sangguniang Kabataan (SK) officials accountable to their constituency in terms of clear processes in development planning, budgeting and disbursement of funds.

name: HBN-00110
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING DISCRIMINATION ON THE BASIS OF SEXUAL ORIENTATION AND GENDER IDENTITY AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Defines and penalizes the practices that unjustly discriminate against lesbians and gays.

name: HBN-00111
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MECHANISM FOR THE SUSTAINABLE DEVELOPMENT AND USE OF THE ISLAND OF BORACAY, MUNICIPALITY OF MALAY, PROVINCE OF AKLAN, DEFINING FOR THE PURPOSE THE MODE OF ACQUISITION FOR CERTAIN PARCELS OF ITS PUBLIC DOMAIN CLASSIFIED AS AGRICULTURAL LAND OPEN TO DISPOSITION UNDER PROCLAMATION NO. 1064 AND PROVIDING ENVIRONMENTAL SAFEGUARDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00112
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE REAPPORTIONMENT OF THE LONE DISTRICT OF THE PROVINCE OF AKLAN

name: HBN-00113
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE AKLAN AIRPORT AUTHORITY AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00114
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF DR. RAFAEL S. TUMBOKON MEMORIAL HOSPITAL IN THE PROVINCE OF AKLAN FROM ONE HUNDRED SIXTY-TWO (162) TO FOUR HUNDRED (400) BEDS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00115
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF IBAJAY DISTRICT HOSPITAL FROM TWENTY-FIVE (25) TO ONE HUNDRED (100) BEDS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00116
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING AUGUST THIRTY-ONE OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NON-WORKING HOLIDAY IN AKLAN TO COMMEMORATE THE BIRTH ANNIVERSARY OF JAIME CARDINAL L. SIN, ARCHBISHOP OF ILOILO AND MANILA, A TRUE-BLOODED AKLANON AND AN ICON OF DEMOCRACY

name: HBN-00117
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING AND STRENGTHENING THE PROBATION SYSTEM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE PERTINENT PROVISIONS OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 968, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'PROBATION LAW OF 1976', AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: Amends five (5) salient points of the Probation Law: 1) provides that the offender could still avail of the benefits of probation, so long as the penalty meted out on appeal remains probationable; 2) increases the probationable period from 6 years and one day to less that eight years; 3) grants benefits of probation to offenders sentenced for crimes against public order that are classified as less grave felonies; 4) vests to Regional Directors the same miscellaneous powers enjoyed by Provincial and City Probation Officers, and considers all of them as persons in authority; and 5) renames the Volunteer Probation Aide as Volunteer Probation Officer in order to attract and encourage more civic minded and responsible members of the private sector to work hand in hand with the Probation and Parole personnel in the rehabilitative effort of the government.

name: HBN-00118
congress_website_title: AN ACT ADOPTING THE SIMPLIFIED NET INCOME TAXATION SCHEME FOR INDIVIDUALS ENGAGED IN TRADE/BUSINESS AND/OR PRACTICE OF PROFESSION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: Allows deduction from gross income only for the following expenses: 1) salaries and wages; 2) supplies and utilities; 3) rentals; 4) losses; 5) bad debts; 6) depreciation; 7) research and development; and 8) charitable contributions.

name: HBN-00119
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO EXTEND THE PERIOD FOR RECTIFICATION OF SIMULATED BIRTHS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SEC. 22 OF RA 8552, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE DOMESTIC ADOPTION ACT OF 1998
congress_website_abstract: Extends For Another Five (5) Years The Rectification Of Simulated Births In Order To Provide An Opportunity For Couples Who May Have Failed To Avail Of Its Salutary Benefits To Do So.

name: HBN-00120
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO EXEMPT THE FAMILY HOME FROM THE PAYMENT OF REAL PROPERTY TAX
congress_website_abstract: Declares a duly constituted family home exempt from payment of the real property tax if the owner of the real property is actually residing therein and the current and fair market value of said property does not exceed Five Hundred Thousand Pesos (P500,000.00).

name: HBN-00121
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING A UNIFORM FRANCHISE TAX ON DISTRIBUTION UTILITIES IN LIEU OF ANY AND ALL TAXES COLLECTED BY THE NATIONAL AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT
congress_website_abstract: Reverts back to the original regime of imposing a tax on electric distribution utilities to lessen the power cost to consumers.

name: HBN-00122
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING THE MAGNA CARTA OF FILIPINO SEAFARERS

name: HBN-00123
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE PRIVATE SECURITY INDUSTRY, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5487, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ACT TO REGULATE THE ORGANIZATION AND OPERATION OF PRIVATE DETECTIVE, WATCHMEN OR SECURITY GUARDS AGENCIES
congress_website_abstract: Professionalizes the efficiency of the private security industry by intensifying the requirements for training and professional certification of security practitioners.

name: HBN-00124
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE SECURITY OF TENURE OF EMPLOYEES, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE ARTICLES 106, 109, 280, AND 281 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBER 442, OR THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES; AND ADDING ARTICLES ARTICLE 108-A ON THE DEFINITION OF CONTRACTING, ARTICLE 108-B ON THE PROHIBITION OF LABOR-ONLY CONTRACTING, ARTICLE 108-C ON THE EXISTENCE OF AN EMPLOYER-EMPLOYEE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN THE CONTRACTOR AND CONTRACTUAL EMPLOYEE, ARTICLE 108-D ON THE RIGHTS OF CONTRACTUAL EMPLOYEES, ARTICLE 108-E ON THE CONTRACT BETWEEN CONTRACTOR OR SUBCONTRACTOR AND CONTRACTUAL EMPLOYEE, ARTICLE 108-F ON THE EFFECT OF TERMINATION OF CONTRACTUAL EMPLOYMENT, ARTICLE 108-G ON LICENSING OF CONTRACTORS AND SUBCONTRACTORS, ARTICLE 108-H ON GOOD FAITH CONTRACTING, ARTICLE 280-A, DEFINING FIXED TERM EMPLOYMENT; AND ARTICLE 280-B, DEFINING PROJECT EMPLOYMENT TO PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBER 442, OR THE LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: Creates a new categorization of employment, one that returns regular employment to its primary position, while making allowances for distressed industries.

name: HBN-00125
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PENALTIES FOR NON-COMPLIANCE WITH THE GOVERNMENT PRESCRIBED MINIMUM WAGES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 12 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6727, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE WAGE RATIONALIZATION ACT, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8188, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Directs any person, corporation, trust, firm, partnership, association or entity which refuses or fails to pay any of the prescribed increases or adjustments in the wage rates in accordance with this Act to be punished as prescribed herein.

name: HBN-00126
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING AN ASSISTANCE PROGRAM FOR OVERSEAS FILIPINO WORKERS IN DISTRESS, AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Creates a Special Assistance Fund for Overseas Filipino Workers in Distress to ensure that our overseas countrymen who are most in need shall be provided with not just cold comfort of intangible promises but the financial aid necessary to ensure their freedom and good health.

name: HBN-00127
congress_website_title: AN ACT LIMITING THE NUMBER OF RENEWALS OF THE CERTIFICATE OF AUTHORITY ISSUED TO BARANGAY MICRO BUSINESS ENTERPRISES (BMBEs) TO TWO (2), AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9178, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE BARANGAY MICRO BUSINESS ENTERPRISES (BMBEs) ACT OF 2002\"
congress_website_abstract: Provides for a definite period of exemption given to the Barangay Micro Business Enterprises (BMBEs) from complying with the Minimum Wage Law to compromise the interest and constitutional rights of the workers to earn a fair “living wage”.

name: HBN-00128
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE VERDE PASSAGE MARINE CORRIDOR LOCATED IN THE PROVINCES OF MARINDUQUE, BATANGAS, MINDORO OCCIDENTAL, MINDORO ORIENTAL, AND ROMBLON AS PROTECTED AREA, PROVIDING FOR ITS MANAGEMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00129
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING FROM THE SECOND LEGISLATIVE DISTRICT OF THE PROVINCE OF BATANGAS TO CONSTITUTE THE LONE LEGISLATIVE DISTRICT OF THE CITY OF BATANGAS

name: HBN-00130
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING THE CODE FOR THE ADMINISTRATION OF FISCAL INCENTIVES FOR THE PROMOTION OF INVESTMENTS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00131
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING THE SALE AND IMPORTATION OF DRUGS, MEDICINES, PHARMACEUTICAL PRODUCTS AND RELATED RAW MATERIALS, AND PHARMACEUTICAL EQUIPMENT AND INSTRUMENTS USED FOR THE MANUFACTURE THEREOF FROM THE COVERAGE OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8424, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9337 AND THE IMPOSITION OF TARIFF AND DUTIES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Exempts from tariff and duties the importation of drugs, medicines, pharmaceutical products and related raw materials and pharmaceutical instruments used for the manufacture of medicines, provided that such importation is accompanied by a certificate duties issued by the Department of Finance stating that such importation is exempt from tariffs and duties based on a certification by the Food and Drugs Administration that the said products being brought into the country are drugs, medicines, pharmaceutical products and related raw materials and pharmaceutical equipment and instruments used for the manufacture of the same.

name: HBN-00132
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE DEPARTMENT FOR OVERSEAS FILIPINO WORKERS (DOFW), DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Mandates the Department to recommend and implement Government´s policies, plans and programs for the promotion of protection, safety, development, support, deployment and repatriation of overseas Filipino workers, and dealing with other hazards while working abroad.

name: HBN-00133
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR AN ADDITIONAL INCENTIVE TO WIDOWS OR ORPHANS OF THE MEMBERS OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES AND THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE WHO HAS DIED IN AN ACTUAL COMBAT WHILE IN ACTIVE SERVICE
congress_website_abstract: Entitles the widow or the orphans of an AFP or a PNP officer who has died in an actual combat, a one-time economic assistance of Ten Thousand Pesos (P10,000.00) and a monthly pension of Two Thousand Pesos (P2,000.00).

name: HBN-00134
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING STIFFER PENALTIES FOR THEFT, ROBBERY AND DESTRUCTION OF PUBLIC SCHOOL PROPERTY
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to increase the jail time and monetary penalties for felons convicted of theft, robbery and destruction of public school property thus preventing the further perpetration of these offenses.

name: HBN-00135
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE PROTECTION OF WHISTLEBLOWERS ENSURING THEIR SECURITY AND PROVIDING BENEFITS FOR THEIR WELFARE
congress_website_abstract: Ensures that best protection is accorded to individuals who disclose matters relating to corruption and other omissions of public officers and employees inimical to the government.

name: HBN-00136
congress_website_title: AN ACT RECOGNIZING THE POTENTIALS OF THE FILIPINO YOUTH TOWARD NATION-BUILDING, PRESCRIBING THE FREE EXERCISE OF CERTAIN RIGHTS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Concretizes the ideals of the Constitution by institutionalizing the rights, freedom and protection of the youth in all aspects of their lives.

name: HBN-00137
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PHILIPPINE HALAL ACCREDITATION AND REGULATORY BOARD AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Institutionalizes a national standard at par with the accepted Halal standards ordained in advanced Muslim societies and the same to be observed in all abattoirs, outlets, hotels, restaurants and other service establishments.

name: HBN-00138
congress_website_title: AN ACT BANNING THE RE-APPOINTMENT OF A REGULAR MEMBER OF THE JUDICIAL AND BAR COUNCIL (JBC) WHO HAS ALREADY SERVED THE FULL TERM
congress_website_abstract: Prohibits the reappointments to the Judicial and Bar Council (JBC) in order to avoid the possibility of instances where its members, in their desire to be reappointed to the Council, succumb to pressure from the executive to nominate individuals based on political considerations instead of their actual merits and qualifications, seriously undermining the quality of judicial appointments and the independence of the judiciary as a whole.

name: HBN-00139
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE NUMBER OF SANDIGANBAYAN DIVISIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1606, AS AMENDED BY R.A. NO. 7975 AND R.A. NO. 8249, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Increases the number of of divisions of the Sandiganbayan from its present five (5) divisions to fifteen (15) divisions to enhance its capacity to resolve anti-graft and corruption cases and to deter further acts of the same which will effectively save billions of pesos for the nation.

name: HBN-00140
congress_website_title: AN ACT ADVANCING AND SUSTAINING SCIENCE, ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY RESEARCH AND EDUCATION, CREATING THE ASSET SCHOLARSHIP CENTER, PROVIDING FOR ITS FINANCING, AND MANDATING IT TO INSTITUTIONALIZE REFORMS IN THE PROCUREMENT AND FUND DISBURSEMENT SYSTEMS IN SCIENCE, ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY SCHOLARSHIP PROGRAMS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides for the establishment of a funding mechanism to augment the massive budgetary requirements needed to sustain and maintain the various programs of the Asset Scholarship Center.

name: HBN-00141
congress_website_title: AN ACT LIMITING THE RE-APPOINTMENT OF PRESIDENTIAL NOMINEES BY-PASSED BY THE COMMISSION ON APPOINTMENTS (CA)
congress_website_abstract: Declares a nominee who has been by-passed for three (3) consecutive instances by the Commission on Appointments as “ineligible” and shall be barred from being reappointed or appointed by the same President.

name: HBN-00142
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTILLING FISCAL DISCIPLINE IN THE PUBLIC SECTOR BY ESTABLISHING DEFICIT-NEUTRAL RULES IN LINE WITH THE PRINCIPLE OF RESPONSIBLE FINANCIAL MANAGEMENT AND TOWARDS PROMOTING SUSTAINABLE ECONOMIC GROWTH
congress_website_abstract: Declares it a policy of the State to instill fiscal discipline in the public sector along the principles of responsible financial management in order to ensure sufficient resources to finance socio-economic development programs toward overall macroeconomic stability and long-term sustainable growth.

name: HBN-00143
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING SEPTEMBER SEVEN OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NON-WORKING HOLIDAY IN THE CITY OF CAVITE, PROVINCE OF CAVITE, TO COMMEMORATE THE FOUNDATION ANNIVERSARY OF THE CITY OF CAVITE

name: HBN-00144
congress_website_title: AN ACT REINSTATING THE MANDATORY RESERVE OFFICERS' TRAINING CORPS (ROTC) FOR STUDENTS IN ALL PUBLIC AND PRIVATE UNIVERSITIES, COLLEGES AND SIMILAR LEARNING INSTITUTIONS
congress_website_abstract: Requires all male tertiary students enrolled in public or private universities, colleges and similar learning institutions to undergo the Reserve Officers' Training Corps (ROTC) which shall form part of the curricula of all baccalaureate degree courses and two-year technical or vocational courses as requisite for graduation.

name: HBN-00145
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING PROTECTION AND BENEFITS TO PERSONS WHO DISCLOSE CONDUCT CONSTITUTING GRAFT AND CORRUPTION AND TO WITNESSES FOR THE PROSECUTION THEREOF, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS HEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Sets up a mechanism to secure any potential informer on graft and corrupt activities so that he will not hesitate to come out in the open.

name: HBN-00146
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A ROAD DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Creates the Road Development Authority primarily charged for the construction and/or rehabilitation, maintenance and operation of selected and desirable infrastructure projects that complement the overall national development efforts, where there are no takers from the private sector.

name: HBN-00147
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PHILIPPINE NUCLEAR AND RADIATION SAFETY COMMISSION, PROVIDING FOR THE REGULATION AND CONTROL OF NUCLEAR AND OTHER RADIOACTIVE MATERIALS, FACILITIES, AND RADIATION GENERATING EQUIPMENT APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00148
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 4 OF REPUBLIC ACT 9184, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"GOVERNMENT PROCUREMENT REFORM ACT\"
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to remove any ambiguity in the interpretation of the scope and application of RA 9184 by amending Section 4 thereof to make it very clear that it applies to all government procurement activities, regardless of source of funds, whether local or foreign and that only treaties or international or executive agreements entered into by the government prior to its enactment shall be exempt from its coverage.

name: HBN-00149
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN THE PEOPLE'S RIGHT TO INFORMATION
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to a) clarify the scope of accessible information by defining clearly the list of allowable exceptions, thereby removing the wide discretion in withholding or granting access; b) provide a uniform and speedy procedure for people´s access to information, thereby closing the loophole that allows administrative avoidance of access; c) enumerate specific acts violative of the right of information that constitute administrative or criminal offenses; and d) introduce mechanism to facilitate better citizen access to information, such as providing standards for record keeping and mandating the pro-active disclosure of classes of information imbued with high public interest.

name: HBN-00150
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR PROTECTION, SECURITY AND BENEFITS OF WHISTLEBLOWERS AND OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Encourages whistleblowers to come out into the open and put an end the corrupt government officials and employees; strengthens the present machinery in ensuring the full protection and security of these brave witnesses against any form of retaliation or ostracism; and, establishes a rewards and benefits system to ensure the livelihood and welfare of these whistleblowers.

name: HBN-00151
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A COMPREHENSIVE NURSING LAW TOWARDS QUALITY HEALTH CARE SYSTEM, REPEALING FOR THIS PURPOSE RA 9173 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PHILIPPINE NURSING ACT OF 2002
congress_website_abstract: Aims to curb the need for adequate health care human resource to provide for permanent positions for nurses to be employed in communities, hospitals and other health institutions that will follow the ideal nursing to patient ratio as prescribed by the Department of Health (DOH) through an exhaustive research.

name: HBN-00152
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR SECURITY OF TENURE FOR ALL NON-REGULAR EMPLOYEES OF THE GOVERNMENT INCLUDING NATIONAL GOVERNMENT AGENCIES, LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS, STATE UNIVERSITIES AND COLLEGES, GOVERNMENT OWNED AND CONTROLLED CORPORATIONS AND ALL OTHER GOVERNMENT INSTRUMENTALITIES, WHO HAVE RENDERED AT LEAST TWO (2) YEARS OF CONTINUOUS SERVICE, AND FOR OTHER RELATED PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Entitles all incumbent non-regular government employees who have rendered at least two (2) years of continuous service in national government agencies, local government units, state universities and colleges, government owned or controlled corporations and all other government instrumentalities to security of tenure.

name: HBN-00153
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A CIVIL SERVICE CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00154
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE CONDITIONAL CASH TRANSFER PROGRAM OF THE GOVERNMENT TO REDUCE POVERTY AND PROMOTE HUMAN CAPITAL DEVELOPMENT AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Institutionalizes the Program which is hoped to help the government meet its Millennium Development Goals, namely: 1) Eradicate Extreme Poverty and Hunger, 2) Achieve Universal Primary Education, 3) Promote Gender Equality, 4) Reduce Child Mortality, and 5) Improve Maternal Health.

name: HBN-00155
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMOTING POSITIVE AND NONVIOLENT DISCIPLINE OF CHILDREN AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Addresses the plight of the children against corporal punishment, an archaic form of teaching discipline to the young, which has no place in modern society, especially if this involves violence in different forms.

name: HBN-00156
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO GOVERN THE OPERATIONS AND ADMINISTRATION OF THE OVERSEAS WORKERS WELFARE ADMINISTRATION
congress_website_abstract: Provides guidelines on matters concerning Overseas Workers Welfare Administration (OWWA), its mandate, purposes and objectives, membership, collection of contributions and availment of benefits and services, and embodies the policies on fund management, programs and service administration.

name: HBN-00157
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A CREDIT ASSISTANCE PROGRAM FOR OVERSEAS WORKERS
congress_website_abstract: Provides credit facilities to an Overseas Filipino Worker (OFW) with a loan of not more than P50,000.00 to be used to defray the living expenses of his family during the first months of absence or to par for recruitment expenses including placement fees, documentation coasts and plane tickets.

name: HBN-00158
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING ALL BARANGAY OFFICIALS, INCLUDING BARANGAY TANODS, MEMBERS OF THE LUPON NG TAGAPAMAYAPA, BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS AND BARANGAY DAY CARE WORKERS, A LUMP SUM RETIREMENT PAY EQUIVALENT TO ONE (1) YEAR HONORARIUM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 393 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991\"
congress_website_abstract: Provides retirement benefits to all barangay officials which will hope to serve as recognition of their contribution to the community, thus encouraging them to honestly continue their public service albeit raising their economic and social status to have decent, healthy and comfortable living conditions.

name: HBN-00159
title: RTC BRANCHES IN THE CITIES OF ALAMINOS, DAGUPAN, SAN CARLOS AND MUNICIPALITY OF LINGAYEN, PANGASINAN
long_title: AN ACT CREATING FOUR (4) ADDITIONAL BRANCHES OF THE REGIONAL TRIAL COURT IN THE CITIES OF ALAMINOS, DAGUPAN AND SAN CARLOS AND IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LINGAYEN, ALL SITUATED IN THE PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 14, PARAGRAPH (A) OF BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980, AS AMENDED, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING FOUR (4) ADDITIONAL BRANCHES OF THE REGIONAL TRIAL COURT IN THE CITIES OF ALAMINOS, DAGUPAN, AND SAN CARLOS AND IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LINGAYEN, ALL SITUATED IN THE PROVINCE OF PANGASINAN, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE BATAS PAMBANSA BLG. 129, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"JUDICIARY REORGANIZATION ACT OF 1980,\" AS AMENDED, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00160
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE PROTECTION AND CONSERVATION OF BAYBAYIN, AND DECLARING BAYBAYIN AS THE NATIONAL SCRIPT OF THE PHILIPPINES

name: HBN-00161
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MAGNA CARTA FOR LOCAL CIVIL REGISTRY PERSONNEL AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides for a more responsive and accountable local government structure whereby local government units shall be given more power, authority, responsibilities, and resources; promotes and improves the social and economic well-being of the Local Civil Registry personnel, their living and working conditions and terms of employment; defines the functions and responsibilities of the Local Civil Registry Offices; develops their skills and capabilities in order that they will be more responsive and better equipped to deliver various programs and projects attached thereto to their mandate; and encourages those with proper qualification and and excellent abilities to join and remain in government service.

name: HBN-00162
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MORE RESPONSIVE CIVIL REGISTRATION SYSTEM AND FOR OTHER PURPOSE
congress_website_abstract: Provides a more responsive system of civil registration that will sustain the need of growing population and the increasing complexities of a civilized nation; standardizes and modernizes the registration procedures necessary to establish the identity of an individual for administrative and legal purposes; and establishes a more efficient and simplified procedures in recording vital events affecting the identity of an individual for the benefit of the general public.

name: HBN-00163
congress_website_title: PHILIPPINE IMMIGRATION ACT

name: HBN-00164
congress_website_title: BANK PROTECTION ACT OF 2013
congress_website_abstract: Strengthens the present efforts of the government in proactively protecting the banking industry and increasing the penalties for bank crimes and facilitating the recovery of the fruits of the crimes; and creates a dedicated police unit to ensure a continuing integrated and coordinated national campaign against bank robberies and other bank crimes.

name: HBN-00165
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING ALL DISPOSABLE LANDS OF THE GOVERNMENT WHICH HAVE REMAINED IDLE AND SUITABLE FOR RESIDENTIAL PURPOSES SHALL BE DEVELOPED INTO SOCIALIZED HOUSING SITE FOR LOW-SALARIED GOVERNMENT AND SALARIED GOVERNMENT AND PRIVATE EMPLOYEES AND SQUATTERS
congress_website_abstract: Direct the National Housing Authority (NHA) to conduct a survey of idle government lands, in coordination with the Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR), which shall be opened for socialized housing.

name: HBN-00166
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER STRENGTHENING THE ANTI-SMUGGLING MECHANISM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1464, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE TARIFF AND CUSTOMS CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00167
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE ILOCOS SUR UPLAND DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00168
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 198, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE PROVINCIAL WATER UTILITIES ACT OF 1973\"
congress_website_abstract: Increases the authorized capitalization of the agency to enable it to pursue its mandate under present times, and increases its local and foreign borrowing authority to ensure the timely availability and arrival capital funds to enable it to achieve its commitment to provide the waterless communities access to potable water.

name: HBN-00169
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING TOBACCO MANUFACTURERS TO USE A MINIMUM OF SEVENTY FIVE PERCENT (75%) LOCALLY PRODUCED TOBACCO IN THE MANUFACTURE OF CIGARETTES IN THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: Penalizes any company for violating this Act with a fine of not less than Ten Million Pesos (P10,000,000.00) for the first offense; Thirty Million Pesos (P30,000,000.00) for the second offense and Fifty Million Pesos (P50,000,000.00) and closure of the establishment of the third offense.

name: HBN-00170
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE BESSANG PASS NATURAL MONUMENT LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CERVANTES, ILOCOS SUR AS A PROTECTED AREA, PROVIDING FOR ITS MANAGEMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00171
congress_website_title: AN ACT RE-ORIENTING THE PHILIPPINE MINING INDUSTRY, ENSURING THE HIGHEST INDUSTRY DEVELOPMENT STANDARDS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Addresses the needs for an alternative framework for the mining industry which should be anchored on the principles of social justice, respect for people´s rights and welfare, environmental conservation, defense of national sovereignty and patrimony, and national industrialization.

name: HBN-00172
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE ESTABLISHMENT OF POLITICAL DYNASTIES
congress_website_abstract: Defines “political dynasty” as the concentration, consolidation or perpetuation of public office and political power by persons related to one another.

name: HBN-00173
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE DOWNSTREAM PETROLEUM INDUSTRY AND FOR OTHER RELATED PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Requires the regulation of the petroleum industry through the creation of a petroleum regulatory council and a buffer fund which shall instead solely serve to cushion consumers against drastic increases in petroleum prices - unlike the Oil Price Stabilization Fund (OPSF) that reimbursed oil companies for “cost under-recoveries.”

name: HBN-00174
congress_website_title: AN ACT RENATIONALIZING PETRON CORPORATION
congress_website_abstract: Institutionalizes the policy of independence from monopoly pricing by transnational oil corporations through the regulation and the gradual industrialization of the petroleum industry.

name: HBN-00175
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING PENSIONS UNDER THE SOCIAL SECURITY SYSTEM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 12 OF R.A. 1161, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE SOCIAL SECURITY LAW
congress_website_abstract: Increases the current Social Security System (SSS) pension rate to make it more responsive to the basic necessities of the pensioners.

name: HBN-00176
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING CENTRALIZED PROCUREMENT OF PETROLEUM IN THE COUNTRY
congress_website_abstract: Requires the institution of a centralized procurement system of all imported crude oil and refined petroleum products, which includes the creation of buffer supplies to cushion consumers against drastic increases in petroleum prices.

name: HBN-00177
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE MINIMUM SALARY GRADE OF GOVERNMENT DOCTORS FROM SALARY GRADE 16 TO 24
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to upgrade the minimum salary grade level of public doctors to encourage more medical professionals to work in the government hospitals instead of going abroad.

name: HBN-00178
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE MINIMUM SALARY OF GOVERNMENT NURSES FROM SALARY GRADE 11 TO 15
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to upgrade the minimum salary grade level of public nurses to provide them with just compensation and to encourage more health workers to work in the government hospitals instead of going abroad.

name: HBN-00179
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ENSURE THAT THE PARTY-LIST SYSTEM IS RESERVED FOR THE MARGINALIZED AND UNDERREPRESENTED AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7941, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"PARTY-LIST SYSTEM ACT\" FOR THAT PURPOSE
congress_website_abstract: Provides that a party-list group, to be eligible for registration, has to be proven as such in an evidentiary public hearing conducted by the Commission on Elections (COMELEC) that it truly represents a marginalized and underrepresented sector and its nominee truly belongs to the sector that he seeks to represent.

name: HBN-00180
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARANGAY PENSION FUND TO PROVIDE PENSION BENEFITS TO ALL BARANGAY OFFICIALS
congress_website_abstract: Derives from the Malampaya Fund as the source of funding for the Barangay Pension Fund.

name: HBN-00181
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A NATIONAL CANCER INSTITUTE TO BE KNOWN AS THE NATIONAL CANCER INSTITUTE OF THE PHILIPPINES APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Establishes a National Cancer Institute which shall compile date, conduct, coordinate researches, investigations, experiments, and studies relating to the cause, diagnosis, and treatment of cancer.

name: HBN-00182
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING A CODE OF CONDUCT FOR DEMOLITION AND EVICTION OF HOMELESS AND UNDERPRIVILEGED CITIZENS
congress_website_abstract: Considers the following as prohibited acts in cases where demolition and eviction are proposed or undertaken: a) any demolition or eviction activity undertaken without the prescribed minimum requirements in this Act; b) any unauthorized use of Police or law enforcement personnel; c) Any concerted acts of violence by any group of persons resisting demolition or eviction activities, which shall include, but not limited to erecting illegal barricades, the use of improvised weapons and the like.

name: HBN-00203
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE USE OF FINE MESH NETS IN TRAMMEL NET SET-UP AND OTHER SIMILAR FISHING OPERATIONS, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 4 AND 89 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8550, OTHERWISE KNOWN THE PHILIPPINE FISHERIES CODE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSE
congress_website_abstract: Defines “trammel net” as a net made of a middle layer of fine mesh and two outer layers coarse mesh so arranged that fish passing in either direction carry some of the fine net through the coarse and are thus captures.

name: HBN-00204
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEVELOPING AND EXPANDING PUBLIC HEALTH INFRASTRUCTURE AND SERVICES, UTILIZING AND APPROPRIATING A PORTION OF THE RESERVE FUND OF THE PHILHEALTH FOR THE PURPOSE, AMENDING SECTION 27 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7875, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE ACT OF 1995, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\"
congress_website_abstract: Requires PhilHealth to set aside a portion of its revenues to be used to augment the expanded public health care infrastructure and services funds which would benefit the poorest municipalities and/or barangays without sufficient public health care infrastructure and services.

name: HBN-00205
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMOTING RAINWATER HARVESTING AND SMALL-SCALE IRRIGATION TECHNOLOGIES AND PRACTICES IN THE PHILIPPINES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to address three imperative issues: water conservation, irrigation for small farms, and adaption to climate change.

name: HBN-00206
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A SYSTEM OF DETERMINING THE MINIMUM FOOD REQUIREMENTS OF FILIPINOS, REORGANIZING THE NATIONAL FOOD AUTHORITY, ESTABLISHING THE NATIONAL STRATEGIC FOOD SUPPLY AND RESERVE CORPORATION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Requires the Department of Agriculture (DA) to define and put together a Food Requirement Plan for Filipinos, ensuring that all Filipinos are able to eat from what is locally produced first before exporting our produce to the international market.

name: HBN-00207
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR REFORMS IN LENDING AND ACCESS DEVICES, PROMOTING ACCOUNTABILITY, RESPONSIBILITY AND DISCLOSURE IN AVAILMENT AND USE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Reforms the credit card industry and promotes consumer protection and financial reform that, among others: will place a cap on the interest rates charged on deferred payments made on credit card purchases to one percent per month, strengthen the provisions of the Electronic Commerce Act to protect merchants against arbitrary charge backs, and to promote accountability, responsibility and disclosure in the credit card industry.

name: HBN-00208
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING THE PHILIPPINE FOREIGN ACT OF 1991 BY PROVIDING A LEGAL AID DESK AND A LEGAL SERVICE HOTLINE IN ALL EMBASSIES AND CONSULATES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide immediate legal assistance to all Filipinos abroad, whether documented or not, by establishing a legal desk and a legal hotline in every embassy and consulate of the Republic of the Philippines.

name: HBN-00209
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE ALLOWANCE PERSONAL AND ADDITIONAL EXEMPTIONS OF INDIVIDUAL TAXPAYERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 35 (A) AND (B) OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: Increases the present levels of personal and additional exemptions for the individual income taxpayers.

name: HBN-00210
congress_website_title: AN ACT REDUCING THE INCOME TAX RATES OF INDIVIDUAL TAXPAYERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CHAPTER III, SECTION 24 (A) (1) (c) OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1997, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: Empowers the consumers with more purchasing power by increasing their take home pay through lower tax rates and hence, lower deductions from their salary.

name: HBN-00211
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING MONOPOLIES, ATTEMPT TO MONOPOLIZE AN INDUSTRY OR LINE OF COMMERCE, MANIPULATION OF PRICES OF COMMODITIES, ASSET ACQUISITION AND INTERLOCKING MEMBERSHIPS IN THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS OF COMPETING CORPORATE BODIES AND PRICE DISCRIMINATION AMONG CUSTOMERS, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR, AND OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Penalizes the combinations or conspiracies in restraint of trade and all forms of artificial machinations that will injure, destroy or prevent free market competition.

name: HBN-00212
congress_website_title: AN ACT INTENSIFYING STEM CELL RESEARCH AND THERAPY IN THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to intensify human stem cell research on medical interventions that are evidence-based under an effective food and drug regulatory system which will undertake appropriate health manpower for research and development responsive to the country´s health needs and problems essential for national development and progress, giving priority to research and development and invention, innovation and utilization, without prejudice to the human embryo.

name: HBN-00213
congress_website_title: AN ACT FIXING THE LIMITS OF FOREST LANDS WITHIN FIVE (5) KILOMETERS FROM EITHER SIDE OF THE ASPIRAS HIGHWAY (FORMERLY KNOWN AS MARCOS HIGHWAY) FROM AGOO, LA UNION TO BAGUIO CITY, REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE PROCLAMATION NO. 1754

name: HBN-00214
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE AGOO-DAMORTIS PROTECTED LANDSCAPE AND SEASCAPE IN THE PROVINCE OF LA UNION AS A PROTECTED AREA, PROVIDING FOR ITS MANAGEMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00215
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION (NBI) EXTENSION OFFICE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, LA UNION, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00216
title: LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) - MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION
long_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) EXTENSION OFFICE LOCATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION INTO A REGULAR LTO DISTRICT OFFICE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) EXTENSION OFFICE LOCATED IN AGOO, LA UNION INTO A REGULAR LTO DISTRICT OFFICE, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00217
title: AGOO DAY
long_title: AN ACT DECLARING DECEMBER 8 OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION TO BE KNOWN AS AGOO DAY
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING DECEMBER 8 OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION, TO BE KNOWN AS \"AGOO DAY\"

name: HBN-00218
congress_website_title: “AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF ROSARIO DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN ROSARIO, LA UNION, FROM TWENTY FIVE (25) TO FIFTY (50), UPGRADING ITS SERVICES AND FACILITIES AND PROFESSIONAL HEALTH CARE, AUTHORIZING THE INCREASE OF ITS MEDICAL PERSONNEL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00219
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING INDUSTRY CLUSTER-BASED PROGRAMS AND PROJECTS THROUGH INTER-LOCAL COOPERATION AND PEOPLE´S PARTICIPATION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Encourages cooperation among local government units (LGUs) and their instrumentalities to institutionalize a program to strengthen people´s participation in local development and to enhance productivity and guarantee income opportunities for all.

name: HBN-00220
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REGULATE THE IMPORTATION, MANUFACTURE, SALE AND DISTRIBUTION OF CHILDREN´S TOYS, SCHOOL SUPPLIES, CHILDCARE ARTICLES AND OTHER RELATED PRODUCTS, CONTAINING TOXIC CHEMICALS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Requires the mandatory full disclosure and display of chemical information on the product label of children´s toys and other articles and provides penalties for violation of this Act.

name: HBN-00221
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING THE CODE FOR ENTERPRISE-BASED EDUCATION AND TRAINING CODE IN THE PHILIPPINES OTHERWISE KNOWN AS EBT CODE THEREBY AMENDING THE LABOR CODE, R.A. 7686 DUAL TRAINING ACT, EXECUTIVE ORDER 111 AND CONSOLIDATING ALL POLICIES AND PROGRAMS TO AFFORD AND TO PROMOTE EMPLOYMENT, PROTECTION OF TRAINEES/STUDENTS AND TO IMPROVE THE QUALITY AND RELEVANCE OF EDUCATION
congress_website_abstract: Aims to improve skills, productivity and enhance trainees employability by reinforcing the adoption of an industry-led manpower development strategy that covers on-the-job trainings in enterprises or places of work.

name: HBN-00222
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROTECTING FILIPINO WOMEN AGAINST UNSCRUPULOUS INDIVIDUALS OPERATING IN THE INTERNET WHO ARE ENGAGED IN MATCH-MAKING ACTIVITIES AND OTHER VARIOUS SCHEMES, PURPOSELY FOR MARRIAGE TO FOREIGN NATIONALS, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6955, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE ANTI-MAIL ORDER BRIDE LAW

name: HBN-00183
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING A BAN OF PRESIDENTIAL APPOINTEES FROM SEEKING ANY ELECTIVE POSITION IMMEDIATELY AFTER THEIR TERMS OF OFFICE
congress_website_abstract: Considers it unlawful for an appointive official to seek an elective position for a period of not less than twelve (12) months from the time that his term of office for the appointive position ends, whether by operation of law, by reason of the expiration of such term or upon a voluntary resignation therefrom.

name: HBN-00184
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING FREE COLLEGE ENTRANCE EXAMINATIONS TO GRADUATING HIGH SCHOOL STUDENTS, HIGH SCHOOL GRADUATES, COLLEGE ENTRANTS OR TRANSFEREES APPLYING FOR ADMISSION IN STATE COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES AND TO UNDERPRIVILEGED PUBLIC HIGH SCHOOL STUDENTS BELONGING TO THE TOP TEN PERCENT (10%) OF THE GRADUATING CLASS APPLYING FOR ADMISSION IN PRIVATE HIGHER EDUCATION INSTITUTIONS
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to ensure that underprivileged but bright and deserving high school graduates are given adequate assistance and equal opportunity to pursue their dreams of obtaining a college education.

name: HBN-00185
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE USE OF ENERGY-EFFICIENT LIGHTING PRODUCTS, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Effects the phasing-out of the production, manufacture and importation of energy-inefficient lighting products where there are more viable alternatives.

name: HBN-00186
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING FULL PUBLIC DISCLOSURE BY GOVERNORS, CITY MAYORS, MUNICIPAL MAYORS, TREASURERS, ACCOUNTANTS, BUDGET OFFICERS AND OTHER FUND ACCOUNTABLE OFFICERS OF THE LOCAL BUDGET AND FINANCES OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNIT AMENDING THEREBY SECTION 352 OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Mandates full disclosure and posting by all the fund accountable officers of the local budget and finances of the local government units of the following: 1) Annual Budget; 2) Quarterly Statement of Cash Flows; 3) Statement of Receipts and Expenditures; 4) Trust Fund (PDAF) Utilization; 5) Special Education Fund Utilization; 6) 20% Component of the IRA Utilization; 7) Gender and Development Fund Utilization; 8) Statement of Debt Service; 9) Annual Procurement Plan or Procurement List; 10) Items to Bid; 11) Bid Results on Civil Works, Goods and Services, and; 12) Abstract of Bids Calculated.

name: HBN-00187
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN ALTERNATIVE-ONLINE LEARNING SYSTEM FOR HIGH SCHOOL AND FIRST TWO YEARS OF COLLEGE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Envisions that one can acquire a high school education and/or two-year college program of study or course without having to attend hours of actual classroom instruction which could entail costs let alone sacrifice.

name: HBN-00188
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE TERM OF OFFICE OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS BY ANOTHER TWO YEARS THEREBY MAKING FIVE YEAR THEIR TERM OF OFFICE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Explains that a three-year term for barangay officials is far too short for our local leaders to hit the ground running in terms of their value, role and impact upon that smaller political unit of the society because the supposedly third year of that people´s mandate has become devoted to actions or inactions preparatory to the subsequent barangay elections.

name: HBN-00189
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE SOCIAL SECURITY SYSTEM TO OPEN A SPECIAL LOAN WINDOW OTHER THAN THAT OF EMERGENCY LOAN FOR PRIVATE SCHOOL TEACHERS AND PRESCRIBING LOW INTEREST RATE FOR ITS REPAYMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Authorizes the Social Security System (SSS) to open a special loan window that would cater to granting financial aid or assistance to teachers in the private sector who want to avail of loans at interest rate comparatively lower than prevailing interest rates.

name: HBN-00190
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSURING THAT PENSION FUNDS OF SOCIAL SECURITY SYSTEM AND THE GOVERNMENT INSURANCE SERVICE SYSTEM ARE SUBJECT OF A CULTURE OF TRANSPARENCY AND INTERNAL SYSTEM OF DISCLOSURE IN ALL ITS BUSINESS OR CORPORATE AFFAIRS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Mandates the Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) to undertake a proactive approach to ensure that no funds whatsoever from the Social Security System (SSS) and Government Service Insurance System (GSIS) could be siphoned off for purposes other than the benefits of the state pension funds and contributions.

name: HBN-00191
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE DEPARTMENT OF OVERSEAS WORKERS, RATIONALIZING THE ORGANIZATION AND FUNCTIONS OF GOVERNMENT AGENCIES RELATED TO OVERSEAS EMPLOYMENT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Creates the Department of Overseas Workers which is mandated to take full charge in the deployment or repatriation, when the need arises, of our Overseas Filipino Workers (OFW), and which agency is made accountable to the OFWs.

name: HBN-00192
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE BOHOL SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE IN THE PROVINCE OF BOHOL, CREATING FOR THE PURPOSE THE BOHOL SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00193
congress_website_title: AN ACT LIBERALIZING THE EXPORT OF RICE, CORN AND OTHER GRAINS OR RELATED AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 6 (a) xiii OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 4, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE NATIONAL GRAINS AUTHORITY ACT, AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide the farmers and agricultural workers better income opportunity, encourage the increase in their productivity and improve their profitability, by allowing greater latitude in the export of their grains produce.

name: HBN-00194
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING HIGHER PENALTIES FOR THE SALE, DISTRIBUTION, TRANSPORT AND STORAGE OF HOT MEAT, AND OTHER ADULTERATED MEAT AND MEAT PRODUCTS CARCASSES OR PARTS THEREOF AND OTHER PROHIBITED ACTS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PERTINENT SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9296, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE NATIONAL MEAT INSPECTION CODE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Imposes stiffer penalties to deter the sale, distribution, transport and storage of hot meat and other adulterated meat and meat products, thus providing utmost protection for the consuming public.

name: HBN-00195
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZE THE CONDITIONAL CASH SUBSIDY PROGRAM OF THE GOVERNMENT, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Institutionalizes the implementation of the program by providing for the statutory authority therefore, ensures continuous funding and lay down the basic parameters for the determination of target-beneficiaries and conditions for their compliance; and provides for the monitoring and assessment mechanisms for the evaluation of the program and defines the duties and obligations of concerned government agencies tasked for the implementation of the program.

name: HBN-00196
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS TO EARMARK A PORTION OF THEIR INTERNAL REVENUE ALLOTMENT (IRA) FOR FREE MEDICINES TO INDIGENT PATIENTS IN THEIR JURISDICTIONS
congress_website_abstract: Requires the Local Government Units (LGUs) to set aside a certain portion of their Internal Revenue Allotment (IRA) to be allocated for the purchase of medicines for free distribution to indigent patients in their respective jurisdictions, in cooperation and coordination with public hospitals, health centers and clinics in their localities and with the Department of Health (DOH).

name: HBN-00197
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING CONSUMER PROTECTION IN THE PURCHASE OF BRAND NEW MOTOR VEHICLES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Gives the buyers of brand new cars the right to demand a replacement with a similar or comparable motor vehicle if the first vehicle is discovered to have a factory defect or opt to return the defective vehicle and get a refund of its purchase price and collateral charges such as the vehicle registration fee.

name: HBN-00198
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING THE HONORARIA OR ALLOWANCES OF BARANGAY OFFICIALS AT MINIMUM WAGE LEVELS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 393 PARAGRAPH (a) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7610, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to peg the honoraria or allowances of barangay officials at minimum wage levels and for the Punong Barangay, place it at a minimum wage level plus 20% premium.

name: HBN-00199
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE OFFENSE OF ECONOMIC SABOTAGE THROUGH THE SOLICITING, SELLING OR OFFERING TO SELL A PRE-NEED PLAN BY MEANS OF FALSE OR MISLEADING REPRESENTATION AND OTHER FRAUDULENT MEANS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 54 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9829, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PRE-NEED CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Considers this kind of economic sabotage as a non-bailable capital offense, thus not only the offender be meted by life imprisonment if found guilty, a mere finding of prima facie evidence during the preliminary investigation would already land the offender in jail.

name: HBN-00200
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE IMPOSITION OF EXPIRATION OF PREPAID CARDS, CERTIFICATES OR OTHER DEVICES OF PREPAYMENT OF GOODS AND SERVICES, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Prohibits the imposition of expiration for all prepaid cards or devices and the refusal of establishments to honor prepaid devices on the ground of its expiry, and provides for criminal penalties for establishments violating this Act.

name: HBN-00201
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING PROTECTION TO CONSUMERS BY EXPANDING THE DEFINITION OF BASIC NECESSITIES AND PRIME COMMODITIES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7581, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE `PRICE ACT´, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Expands the definition of basic necessities and prime commodities through the inclusion of other goods such as potable bottled water, kerosene, LPG and noodles, and provides mechanism for greater flexibility in their respective coverage through administrative fiat without need of legislative enactment.

name: HBN-00202
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR ADDITIONAL ALLOWANCE FOR GOOD CONDUCT TO PRISONERS WHO STUDY, LEARN AND SEEK LITERACY SKILLS AND VALUES IN PENAL INSTITUTIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ACT NO. 3815, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"REVISED PENAL CODE\", AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Declares it a policy of the State to provide learning and literacy opportunities for detention prisoners and even those who are serving imprisonment by final judgment, to make the prison system truly correctional and reformative, and to truly allow detention prisoners and ex-convicts a real chance to reintegrate into free society.

name: HBN-00223
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING DISCOUNTS TO UNDERPRIVILEGED COLLEGE STUDENTS ON BASIC AND EDUCATION SERVICES
congress_website_abstract: Grants discounts to underprivileged but deserving college students to encourage more youth to enroll in the tertiary level of education and thus helping the State produce more graduates who will eventually lead the country in nation building.

name: HBN-00224
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE WITNESS PROTECTION, SECURITY AND BENEFIT PROGRAM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6981, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"WITNESS PROTECTION, SECURITY AND BENEFIT ACT\", AND PROVIDING ADDITIONAL FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Provides for a separate “Witness Protection, Security and Benefit Program” for the resource persons and witnesses in legislative investigations in aid of legislation.

name: HBN-00225
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING A NON-WAGE BENEFIT TO PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS IN THE FORM OF FREE TERTIARY EDUCATION IN ANY STATE COLLEGE OR UNIVERSITY FOR ONE (1) DEPENDENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Promotes the right to education by providing access and opportunity to the children of our public school teachers thereby addressing the dismal situation of education and the financial hardships that they face to provide tertiary education to their own children because of their meager income.

name: HBN-00226
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR ADDITIONAL SUPPORT AND COMPENSATION FOR EDUCATORS IN BASIC EDUCATION
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to alleviate the problem of teachers in the basic education sector by providing additional benefits, namely: a P9,000.00 increase in their salary and other support such as medical allowance and the annual magna carta bonus.

name: HBN-00227
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7875 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE NATIONAL HEALTH INSURANCE ACT OF 1995\" AS AMENDED AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Hastens the process of identifying the indigent Filipinos through the use of a means to test set to allow the national government to effectively use funds to provide health insurance coverage for the said group.

name: HBN-00228
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ENSURE THAT EVERY FILIPINO IS GRANTED WITH BASIC HEALTHCARE SERVICES, PROVIDING FOR THE PURPOSE A MANDATORY UNIVERSAL HEALTHCARE COVERAGE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides for a mandatory universal health care coverage of all Filipinos by automatic enrollment in PhilHealth, which shall be funded by the national government through the inclusion of the required contribution in the General Appropriations Act annually.

name: HBN-00229
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING GRANT OF COMPENSATION IN THE FORM OF ADDITIONAL HONORARIUM TO BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS
congress_website_abstract: Grants compensation to accredited Barangay Health Workers, in addition to the benefits and incentives authorized under RA No. 7883, in the form of an additional honorarium of Four Thousand Pesos (P4,000.00) on top of the current One Thousand Pesos (P1,000.00) they receive per month from their respective LGUs.

name: HBN-00230
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9296 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE MEAT INSPECTION CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES\", PRESCRIBING PENALTIES OF IMPRISONMENT AND FINES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF AND AMENDING CHAPTER XIV THEREOF FOR THE PURPOSE
congress_website_abstract: Imposes stiffer penalties for trading and selling of meat of dead or diseased animals ranging from Fifty Thousand Pesos (P50,000.00) to Two Hundred Thousand Pesos (P200,000.00) or imprisonment of six (6) years to twelve (12) years.

name: HBN-00231
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE USE OF THE LABEL \"FRESH MILK\" IN THE PACKAGING AND SALE OF PASTEURIZED AND PROCESSED MILK AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEROF
