congress_website_abstract: Prohibits the labeling of “fresh milk” in packages that contain pasteurized and processed milk.

name: HBN-00232
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXEMPTING FROM THE POPULATION AND THE LAND AREA REQUIREMENTS THE CONVERSION OF A MUNICIPALITY INTO A COMPONENT CITY IF IT HAS A LOCALLY GENERATED AVERAGE ANNUAL INCOME OF AT LEAST TWO HUNDRED TWENTY MILLION PESOS (P220,000,000.00), AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 450 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Exempts from the population and area requirements prescribed in the requisites for the creation of a component city has a locally generated average annual income of at least Two hundred twenty million (P220,000,000.00) pesos for at least two (2) consecutive years.

name: HBN-00233
congress_website_title: AN ACT AN ACT MAKING THE APPOINTMENT OF COOPERATIVES OFFICER MANDATORY IN ALL PROVINCES, CITIES, AND MUNICIPALITIES AMENDING SECTION 487 (a) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Prescribes for the mandatory appointment of a cooperatives officer in all provinces, cities and municipalities.

name: HBN-00234
congress_website_title: AN ACT MAKING THE APPOINTMENT OF AN ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES OFFICER MANDATORY IN ALL PROVINCES, CITIES AND MUNICIPALITIES, AMENDING SECTION 484 (a) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160 AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991\"
congress_website_abstract: Prescribes for the mandatory appointment of an environment and natural resources officer in all provinces, cities and municipalities.

name: HBN-00235
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING STIFFER PENALTIES FOR FALSIFICATION OF CERTIFICATES OF LAND TITLE OR ANY APPLICATION, DEED, INSTRUMENT OR SUPPORTING DOCUMENT, REASONABLY CONNECTED WITH AND CALCULATED TO CAUSE THE ISSUANCE OF A CERTIFICATE OF LAND TITLE, CLASSIFYING THE SAME AS A HEINOUS OFFENSE INVOLVING ECONOMIC SABOTAGE IF THE VALUE OR AGGREGATE VALUE OF THE LAND IS AT LEAST TEN MILLION PESOS (P10,000,000.00), AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLES 171 AND 172 OF ACT NO. 3815, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS, THE REVISED PENAL CODE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Imposes stiffer penalties for falsification of certificates of land title or any application, deeds, instrument or supporting document, reasonably connected with and calculated to cause the issuance of a certificate of land title, classifying the same as a heinous crime involving economic sabotage if the value or aggregate value of the land is at least Ten million (P10,000,000.00) pesos.

name: HBN-00236
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE CONGRESSIONAL AVENUE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GENERAL MARIANO ALVAREZ (GMA), PROVINCE OF CAVITE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00237
congress_website_title: “AN ACT CONVERTING SOUTHWOODS AVENUE IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CARMONA, PROVINCE OF CAVITE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00238
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE COMMISSION ON HUMAN RIGHTS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Strengthens the Commission with the express grant of residual prosecutorial powers, streamlined bureaucratic structure, functional fiscal autonomy, and a more comprehensive rights-based approach to human rights that will include social, economic and political rights of individuals.

name: HBN-00239
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROTECTING THE RIGHTS OF INTERNALLY DISPLACED PERSONS, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to identify the rights and guarantees of the internally-displaced persons (IDPs) for their resettlement, return and reintegration in all phases of displacements; acknowledges the primary responsibility of the national authorities to provide protection and assume accountability in cases of violations their rights, and; incorporates the best practices among all IDP laws of other countries and make them effective and functional in the Philippine context.

name: HBN-00240
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF THE DAVAO REGIONAL HOSPITAL FROM TWO HUNDRED (200) TO FIVE HUNDRED (500) BEDS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00241
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE ADDITIONAL INCOME TAX EXEMPTION FOR EACH QUALIFIED DEPENDENT FROM TWENTY-FIVE THOUSAND PESOS (P25,000) TO FIFTY THOUSAND PESOS (P50,000), AMENDING CHAPTER VII, SECTION 35 (B) OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE (NIRC), AS AMENDED, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Reasons that this tax relief will generally redound to the benefit of the dependents´ education and answers for their other basic needs while providing additional financial support to parents, particularly those who are single and have sole custody of the dependent child or children.

name: HBN-00242
congress_website_title: AN ACT LOWERING THE MANDATORY RETIREMENT AGE OF GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 13(b) AND 13-A OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8291, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE GOVERNMENT SERVICE INSURANCE SYSTEM ACT OF 1997, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Lowers the mandatory retirement age of government employees from sixty five (65) to sixty (60) in order to decrease if not eliminate the stand-off created in terms of position movement and the accommodation of new entrants.

name: HBN-00243
congress_website_title: AN ACT NATIONALIZING THE CASOON HIGH SCHOOL (MONKAYO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ANNEX) IN BARANGAY CASOON, MONKAYO, COMPOSTELA VALLEY PROVINCE, INTO THE CASOON NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00244
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING CONSUMER PROTECTION IN THE PURCHASE OF BRAND NEW MOTOR VEHICLES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides for the protection of consumers from scheming manufacturers and defective products.

name: HBN-00245
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE MINIMUM MONTHLY SALARIES OF PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS TO TWENTY FIVE THOUSAND PESOS (P25,000) AND NON-TEACHING PERSONNEL TO FIFTEEN THOUSAND PESOS (P15,000)

name: HBN-00246
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE MINIMUM SALARY GRADE OF PUBLIC HIGHER EDUCATION TEACHING PERSONNEL FROM SALARY GRADE 12 TO 16

name: HBN-00247
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE ALLOWANCE OF PERSONAL EXEMPTION FOR INDIVIDUAL TAXPAYERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 35 (A) AND (B) OF REPUBLIC ACT 8424, OR THE TAX REFORM ACT OF 1997, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT 9504

name: HBN-00248
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE CEILING FOR THE TOTAL EXCLUSION FROM GROSS INCOME OF 13TH MONTH PAY AND OTHER BENEFITS TO SIXTY THOUSAND PESOS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 32 (B)(7)(E) OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE

name: HBN-00249
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER STRENGTHENING THE GOVERNMENT SERVICE INSURANCE SYSTEM
congress_website_abstract: Aims to strengthen the existing law by improving members´ benefits and institutionalizing members´ rights and responsibilities of agency employers, thus making regular remittance of premiums, reconciliation of records, and prompt processing of claims duly demandable and actionable rights.

name: HBN-00250
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PERSONNEL ECONOMIC RELIEF ALLOWANCE GRANTED TO GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES TO FOUR THOUSAND PESOS (P4,000) AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00251
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A TEACHING SUPPLIES ALLOWANCE FOR PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to relieve teachers from financial burden of paying for everyday classroom supplies out of their own pockets.

name: HBN-00252
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING GENUINE AGRARIAN REFORM IN THE COUNTRY AND CREATING THE MECHANISM FOR ITS IMPLEMENTATION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00253
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A P125.00 DAILY ACROSS-THE-BOARD INCREASE IN THE SALARY RATES OF EMPLOYEES AND WORKERS IN THE PRIVATE SECTOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00254
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING JANUARY TWENTY-TWO OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL WORKING HOLIDAY TO BE KNOWN AS NATIONAL FARMER´S DAY

name: HBN-00255
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT 8479, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE DOWNSTREAM OIL DEREGULATION LAW OF 1998
congress_website_abstract: Reverts back to the State the authority to oversee, regulate and damage the downstream oil industry and prohibits cartelization of the oil industry.

name: HBN-00256
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9136 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS AN ACT ORDAINING REFORMS IN THE POWER INDUSTRY, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE CERTAIN LAWS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Repeals Republic Act No. 9136 or the Electric Power Industry Reform Act of 2001 (EPIRA) for its failure to genuinely reform the power industry sector, and as result, it only strengthened the private sector´s control and oligopoly in the power industry.

name: HBN-00257
congress_website_title: AN ACT REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10083 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE `AURORA PACIFIC ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREEPORT ACT OF 2010´

name: HBN-00258
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE ACCESS OF MINORS TO ALCOHOLIC OR INTOXICATING LIQUOR OR BEVERAGE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to initiate proactive policies to curb alcohol consumption by children and teens, consistent with the Constitution´s mandate to “protect their physical, moral, spiritual, intellectual, and social well-being.”

name: HBN-00259
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL PLAN FOR TUBERCULOSIS PREVENTION, DETECTION, TREATMENT AND CONTROL AND PROVIDING RELIABLE DRUGS SUPPLY AND FREE LABORATORY MONITORING SERVICE TO TB PATIENT
congress_website_abstract: Establishes a national plan for Tuberculosis prevention, detection, treatment and control by increasing investment in its control and enjoining the government, non-government organizations, and other concerned sectors to band together in putting an end to this nationwide epidemic.

name: HBN-00260
congress_website_title: AN ACT MAKING VOTER´S EDUCATION MANDATORY IN THE HIGH SCHOOL CURRICULUM IN BOTH PUBLIC AND PRIVATE SCHOOLS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to instruct high school students who are about to be first-time voters the importance of the right of suffrage, how the voters should evaluate and choose the candidates and their consequent duty to maintain the sanctity of the ballots and the electoral process.

name: HBN-00261
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING PARENTS TO PLANT TWO TREES FOR EVERY CHILD BORN TO THEM, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Requires the planting of two (2) trees for every child born of a couple, one tree for the father and another for the mother as an effort to help the reforestation crusade of the State.

name: HBN-00262
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE USE OF LIGHT EMITTING DIODE (LED) LIGHTS IN ALL GOVERNMENT OFFICES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Requires all government offices to cease from using incandescent bulbs and fluorescent tube lights and CFL bulbs which contain mercury, a known toxic metal used to run these bulbs, and instead replace these with Light Emitting Diodes (LED) lights in order to promote economy in governance and to protect the right of the people to a balanced and healthful ecology.

name: HBN-00323
congress_website_title: AN ACT ALLOWING THE FLAG TO BE FLOWN AT HALF MAST IN CERTAIN DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION SCHOOLS OR DISTRICT OFFICES TO MOURN THE DEATH OF FORMER OR INCUMBENT PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS ASSIGNED THEREAT, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSES, SECTION 23 OF REPUBLIC ACT 8491 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FLAG AND HERALDIC CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: Allows the Flag to be flown in half-mast as a sign of mourning on the official announcement of the death of a retired or incumbent public school teacher in Department of Education (DepEd) schools or district offices where the deceased was teaching or was assigned to.

name: HBN-00324
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE PRESENTATION TO THE PRESS OR PUBLIC OF SUSPECTS IN CRIMINAL INVESTIGATIONS BEFORE CASES ARE FORMALLY FILED AGAINST THE SUSPECTS
congress_website_abstract: Declares it unlawful for any person to present publicly or in a press conference any suspect who is being investigated by a government office for possible criminal liability before formal charges are filed against him or her in court, unless there is a written consent by the suspect with the assistance of a counsel.

name: HBN-00325
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 284 AND 393 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991\"
congress_website_abstract: Increases the Internal Revenue Allotment (IRA) of the barangays by one per cent (1%) which shall be solely dedicated to the Barangay Retirement Funds for the retirement benefits of barangay officials.

name: HBN-00326
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE NATIONAL TELECOMMUNICATIONS COMMISSION (NTC) TO INSTALL A REGULATORY METERING DEVICE TO INTERLINK WITH THE TELECOMMUNICATIONS INDUSTRY PLAYERS AS AN ENHANCEMENT TO ITS SUPERVISORY FUNCTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Prescribes for the mandatory installation of a metering device - an electronic platform which will record every text, call, internet usage, and other transactions being offered by the telcos - between the National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) and the telecommunications players as part of its regulatory and supervisory functions in the industry.

name: HBN-00327
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING NONFEASANCE IN THE MAINTENANCE OF ROAD CONDITIONS AND SIGNAGES
congress_website_abstract: Aims to identify liable and accountable officers when injury or death occurs because of clear neglect in the proper maintenance of the road and signages.

name: HBN-00328
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 220, CHAPTER II, TITLE VIII OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8424
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to make it mandatory for the Bureau of Internal Revenue (BIR) to take exclusive jurisdiction in handling tax cases and by discouraging referral of the cases to the Department of Justice (DOJ).

name: HBN-00329
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL GAMING COMMISSION, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to centralize all government regulations and supervisions over gambling and gaming in the country to ensure maximization of earnings from casinos, lotto and sweepstakes operations, small time lottery (STL), and cockfighting and horseracing games and from other numbers games.

name: HBN-00330
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING THE FEES AND CHARGES ON FIREARMS, AMMUNITION, SPARE PARTS, ACCESSORIES, COMPONENTS, EXPLOSIVES, EXPLOSIVE INGREDIENTS, PYROTECHNICS AND FIRECRACKERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 256, S. 1995
congress_website_abstract: Authorizes the Firearms and Explosives Division (FED) to retain twenty percent (20%) of the total collections for firearms and explosive fees and charges to fund the direct and operational expenses of the FED other than what is provided for in the General Appropriations Act.

name: HBN-00331
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF THE PACIFIC PALISADES SUPERHIGHWAY CONNECTING THE PROVINCES OF BICOL, QUEZON, AURORA, QUIRINO, ISABELA AND CAGAYAN

name: HBN-00332
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE TO SELL THE NEW BILIBID PRISONS AND FROM THE PROCEEDS THEREOF TO ACQUIRE FOUR NEW PRISON FACILITIES TO BE LOCATED IN LUZON, VISAYAS, MINDANAO, AND THE NEW CAPITAL REGION
congress_website_abstract: Directs the Department of Justice, through the Bureau of Corrections, to sell the facilities and properties of the New Bilibid Prison, located in Muntinlupa City, to the highest possible bidder, with the proceeds of the sale to be exclusively used for the purchase of new Penal colony facilities to be located in Luzon, Visayas, Mindanao and the National Capital Region, respectively.

name: HBN-00333
congress_website_title: AN ACT DIVIDING THE PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL SUR INTO TWO SEPARATE PROVINCES, NAMELY MARANAW AND LANAO DEL SUR

name: HBN-00334
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE DANUGAN-DAPAO-KALENTAY PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE 2ND DISTRICT, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL SUR INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF

name: HBN-00335
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE MALABANG-LUMBATAN PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE 2ND DISTRICT, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL SUR INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF

name: HBN-00336
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7883
congress_website_abstract: Entitles an accredited barangay health worker to a monthly honorarium of Four thousand pesos (P4,000.00) and a mandatory accident insurance which shall be provided by the concerned local government unit.

name: HBN-00337
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING GRANTS TO INSTITUTE PROJECTS TO PROVIDE EDUCATION ON PREVENTING TEEN PREGNANCIES
congress_website_abstract: Authorizes the Secretary of Health to award grants to local educational agencies, local public health agencies and non-profit private entities for the purpose of carrying out projects to provide education on preventing teen pregnancies.

name: HBN-00338
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MATERNAL AND INFANT HEALTH HOME VISITING PROGRAM
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to improve and expand the availability of, and access to, needed comprehensive maternity care services for women particularly low income pregnant adolescents.

name: HBN-00339
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROTECTING THE WELFARE OF PREGNANT WOMEN BY GRANTING THEM CERTAIN BENEFITS AND PRIVILEGES
congress_website_abstract: Grants working pregnant women benefits like flexible work schedules, protection from discrimination, monthly medical leaves and medical assistance.

name: HBN-00340
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING GRANTS FOR THE TRAINING OF MEDICAL RESIDENTS IN PREVENTIVE MEDICINE AND PUBLIC HEALTH
congress_website_abstract: Defines Preventive Medicine as the “specialty of medical practice which focuses on the health of individuals in order to protect, promote and maintain health and well-being and prevent disease, disability and premature death.

name: HBN-00341
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MODERNIZATION OF THE SCHOOL HEALTH AND NUTRITION PROGRAM (SHNP) OF THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION, CULTURE AND SPORTS, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to modernize and upgrade the School Health and Nutrition Program (SHNP) of the Department of Education, which is designed to promote, protect and maintain the health and nutritional well-being of the various sectors of elementary and secondary educational institutions, to maximize its contribution to quality basic education.

name: HBN-00342
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING DISCRIMINATION ON THE BASIS OF SEXUAL ORIENTATION OR GENDER IDENTITY
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to ensure respect for the human rights of all persons, regardless of sex, sexual orientation or any other condition.

name: HBN-00283
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING THE PARTICIPATION OF BONA FIDE CIVIL SOCIETY ORGANIZATION (CSOs) BUDGET HEARINGS AND DELIBERATIONS IN CONGRESS, IN NATIONAL GOVERNMENT AGENCIES (NGAs), AND LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS (LGUs)
congress_website_abstract: Guarantees the participation of independent civil society organizations (CSOs) in the formulation, monitoring and evaluation of the national and local budgets to ensure that the annual appropriations will be an instrument of development and reflective of national and local objectives, strategies and plans.

name: HBN-00284
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CREATION OF THE COOPERATIVE BANKING ACT OF 2013
congress_website_abstract: Establishes the Cooperative Banks that would make needed credit available and readily accessible to primary cooperatives and non-bankable sectors of the society in the rural areas on affordable terms.

name: HBN-00285
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE SILAE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - ST. PETER ANNEX IN BARANGAY ST. PETER, CITY OF MALAYBALAY, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON FROM THE SILAE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS ST. PETER NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

name: HBN-00286
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE HALAPITAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - LITTLE BAGUIO ANNEX IN BARANGAY LITTLE BAGUIO, MUNICIPALITY OF SAN FERNANDO, PROVINCE OF BUKIDNON FROM THE HALAPITAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, TO BE KNOWN AS LITTLE BAGUIO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

name: HBN-00287
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING EXEMPTION TO THE PUBLIC SCHOOL EDUCATORS AND EDUCATION PERSONNEL FROM THE COVERAGE OF REPUBLIC ACT 6758, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE SALARY STANDARDIZATION LAW AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATIONS OF FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Provides for the granting of exemption to eligible public school educators and education personnel from the Salary Standardization Law (SSL), calling for the formulation of a comprehensive and competitive salary structure, independent from the SSL.

name: HBN-00288
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A COMPREHENSIVE PROFESSIONAL DEVELOPMENT FOR ELEMENTARY SCHOOL HEADS IN EARLY CHILDHOOD EDUCATION AND DEVELOPMENT AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Aims to ensure effective implementation of early childhood education and development initiatives in the local level by upgrading the knowledge and managerial skills of the elementary school heads on the creation of quality early learning environment, provision for relevant curriculum application of best practices in early childhood teaching, and strengthening linkages with stakeholders.

name: HBN-00289
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FURTHER BENEFITS TO PUBLIC SCHOOL EDUCATORS IN FORM OF DISCOUNT PRIVILEGES, PROVIDING THE MECHANICS FOR ITS IMPLEMENTATION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide the public school educators non-wage benefits in the form of special discounts on private establishments, medicines, restaurants, fares and other business institutions.

name: HBN-00290
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING AUTOMATIC EXPENDITURE FOR MEDICAL EXAMINATION AND TREATMENT OF PUBLIC SCHOOL EDUCATORS AND EMPLOYEES IN THE ANNUAL GENERAL APPROPRIATIONS ACT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides public school teaching and non-teaching personnel with compulsory medical attention and treatment, free of charge.

name: HBN-00291
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING SCHOLARSHIP GRANTS TO PUBLIC SCHOOL EDUCATORS AND THEIR CHILDREN AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to accord public school educators additional benefits through the institutionalization of scholarship grants and extending the same benefits to their children.

name: HBN-00292
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING PLANTILLA POSITION IN THE DEPARTMENT OF EDUCATION FOR VOLUNTEER EDUCATORS WITH AT LEAST FIVE YEARS OF CONTINUOUS SERVICE IN THE PUBLIC SCHOOL SYSTEM AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Creates plantilla positions to qualified volunteer educators who have continuously served for at least five (5) years, to give them adequate income, accord them the dignity they deserve as practitioners of the profession, and thereby strengthening the spirit of volunteerism as inherent goodness of the Filipino race.

name: HBN-00293
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING THE CRIME OF DEFECTIVE TEXTBOOK PUBLICATION, PROVIDING FOR PREVENTION, SUPPRESSION AND IMPOSITION OF PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: States that defective textbooks are those that are filled with errors and omission, defects that point to the accuracy and validity of contents as the textbooks contain factual and conceptual errors, or even grammatical errors, as well as biases and prejudices that can cause undue influence and negative effects to the value system of students and other individuals who read them.

name: HBN-00294
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING GUIDELINES FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT AND OPERATION OF LOCAL COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: States that the Local College or University (LCU) refers to a public higher education institution (HEI) established in a local government unit (LGU) through an establishing ordinance and financially supported by the concerned LGU.

name: HBN-00295
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE INFORMATION AND COMMUNICATION TECHNOLOGY TRAINING PROGRAM FOR BASIC EDUCATION TEACHERS PROVIDING CERTAIN POLICIES AND MECHANISMS FOR ITS IMPLEMENTATION
congress_website_abstract: Aims to institute certain policies and mechanisms that will strengthen training programs for teachers that will provide them significant knowledge and skills on information and communication technology (ICT), enabling them to apply computer-aided teaching methodologies and digital tools and techniques in their classroom activities.

name: HBN-00296
congress_website_title: AN ACT RECOGNIZING THE VITAL ROLE OF SCHOOL HEADS AS THE CHIEF EXECUTIVES OF BASIC EDUCATION GOVERNANCE AT THE SCHOOL LEVEL WHICH RENDERS THEM HIGHLY-RELIABLE AND MOST DEPENDABLE TO BECOMING MEMBERS OF THE LOCAL SCHOOL BOARDS, AMENDING IN VIEW THEREOF, REPUBLIC ACT 7160, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE `LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991´
congress_website_abstract: Includes THE DULY ELECTED REPRESENTATIVE OF ALL PUBLIC SCHOOL HEADS IN THE PROVINCE as members in the provincial school boards.

name: HBN-00297
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE COMMUNITY SCHOOL BOARDS
congress_website_abstract: Aims to strengthen governance of public basic education at the local level by providing the creation of Community School Board in a barangay or within the cluster or group of barangays which will be constituted in accordance with certain provisions under this Act.

name: HBN-00298
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING CERTAIN GUIDELINES ON COLLECTION OF SCHOOL CONTRIBUTIONS FROM PUBLIC ELEMENTARY AND HIGH SCHOOL STUDENTS, EXPANDING THE PROVISION OF FREE PUBLIC BASIC EDUCATION THEREOF, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to prescribe certain guidelines that will apply on the collections in public elementary and secondary school, delineating which fees are free and which are not, specifying conditions for collection and/or payment of the later.

name: HBN-00299
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING SPITTING IN PUBLIC PLACES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to prohibit spitting in public places to prevent tuberculosis (TB) and other contagious and airborne diseases and thereby spreading environmental and health consciousness among the citizens apart from changing societal habits and lifestyles.

name: HBN-00300
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING COLLECTION OR SOLICITATION OF FEES FOR THE USE OF COMFORT ROOMS IN COMMERCIAL AREAS APPROPRIATING FUNDS AND PROVIDING MECHANISMS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Prohibits the collection or solicitation of fees from any person using comfort rooms in commercial areas in order to give access of basic services to the public especially the underprivileged, persons with disabilities (PWD) and senior citizens.

name: HBN-00301
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE COMPREHENSIVE SUBIC-CLARK DEVELOPMENT PROGRAM, ESTABLISH THE MECHANISM FOR ITS IMPLEMENTATION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00302
congress_website_title: THE INVESTMENTS AND INCENTIVES CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES

name: HBN-00303
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING CONSUMER PROTECTION IN THE PURCHASE OF BRAND NEW MOTOR VEHICLES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Promotes full protection to the rights of consumers in the sale of motor vehicles against sales and trade practices which are deceptive, unfair, or otherwise inimical to consumers and the public interest.

name: HBN-00304
congress_website_title: AN ACT RECONFIGURING THE DISPOSITION OF THE MONIES COLLECTED AND DELINEATING THE STATUS OF THE SPECIAL FUNDS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 7 AND 8 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8794, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE MOTOR VEHICLE USER'S CHARGE LAW, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to give justice to the original intention of the law which is to provide funds for the maintenance of provincial roads.

name: HBN-00305
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE PROTECTION, REHABILITATION, AND SUSTAINABLE MANAGEMENT OF FOREST ECOSYSTEM AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00306
congress_website_title: AN ACT ENCOURAGING CORPORATE SOCIAL RESPONSIBILITY, PROVIDING INCENTIVES THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to foster sustainable economic and environment development and environment protection, among other things, by institutionalizing corporate social responsibility in corporations, whether domestic or foreign, partnership and other establishments performing business in the country.

name: HBN-00307
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO GIVE JURIDICAL PERSONALITY TO THE PRESENT VETERANS MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER (VMMC) AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide stable, viable and ample resources to ensure that the veterans and military retirees receive quality medical and health services.

name: HBN-00308
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE POLITICAL PARTY SYSTEM, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Aims to strengthen the political party system in the country in order to develop, achieve genuine political development and democratization.

name: HBN-00309
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 27 AND 71 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6657, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE COMPREHENSIVE AGRARIAN REFORM LAW OF 1988 THEREBY LIFTING THE RESTRICTION ON THE RIGHT OF FARMER-BENEFICIARIES TO MORTAGE AND/OR ENCUMBER THE LANDS AWARDED TO THEM UNDER THE COMPREHENSIVE AGRARIAN REFORM PROGRAM AND ALLOWING THE SUBMISSION OF THE CERTIFICATE OF LAND OWNERSHIP AWARD AS SUFFICIENT COLLATERAL FOR LOANS ENTERED INTO WITH BANKS AND/OR OTHER FINANCIAL INTERMEDIARIES
congress_website_abstract: Lifts the restrictions that bar the farm workers from using the lands awarded to them as collateral for any loan transaction to enhance their chances of gaining credit and thereby equipping them with the necessary tools to improve their living conditions

name: HBN-00310
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE COMPULSORY DISCLOSURE OF FIRE SAFETY STANDARDS AND MEASURES IN CAMPUS BUILDINGS
congress_website_abstract: Ensures the students´ safety by compelling all learning institutions, whether public or private, to disclose their current fire safety practices and programs so that areas of improvement can be properly identified and appropriate measures adopted.

name: HBN-00311
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN AND ENHANCE THE USE OF ENGLISH AS THE MEDIUM OF INSTRUCTION IN PHILIPPINE SCHOOLS
congress_website_abstract: Aims to correct the defects of the current Bilingual Education Program of the Department of Education with the ultimate objective of the improvement of the learning process in schools to ensure quality outputs.

name: HBN-00312
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PENALTY OF THE CRIME OF CARNAPPING AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 14 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6539 ENTITLED \"AN ACT PREVENTING AND PENALIZING CARNAPPING\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Imposes a stricter penalty to the crime of carnapping thus preventing perpetrators from repeating their heinous crime and violent acts and by declaring the crime as a non-bailable offense.

name: HBN-00313
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING INCENTIVES TO ALL BARANGAY OFFICIALS, INCLUDING BARANGAY TANODS AND MEMBERS OF THE LUPONG TAGAPAMAYAPA, AND BARANGAY EMPLOYEES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to give due recognition to the important job being performed by these grassroots workers as well as to acknowledge the vital role being played by the smallest government unit and political subdivision called barangay.

name: HBN-00314
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING SITIO CAMACHILE IN BARANGAY NABUKLOD, MUNICIPALITY OF FLORIDABLANCA, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, INTO A BARANGAY FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00315
congress_website_title: AN ACT SETTING THE DIRECTION OF AND PARAMETERS FOR THE DEVELOPMENT OF AND REGULATION OF THE TRANSPORTATION SYSTEM IN THE PHILIPPINES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Aims to ensure efficient movement of goods, promote economic activity in both urban and rural areas and encourage the flow of investment by developing an efficient and high quality transport system.

name: HBN-00316
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR UNEMPLOYMENT BENEFIT TO BE PROVIDED BY THE SOCIAL SECURITY SYSTEM, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8282 ENTITLED \"AN ACT FURTHER STRENGTHENING THE SOCIAL SECURITY SYSTEM THEREBY AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE, REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1161, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE SOCIAL SECURITY LAW\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide unemployment benefits to an SSS member who is unemployed, provided that he has been a member for at least seven (7) years and has regularly paid monthly contributions for the same period.

name: HBN-00317
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160 ENTITLED \"THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Allows barangays which were created after the passage of the Local Government Code of 1991 to receive their full share of the Internal Revenue Allotment (IRA) and thus provides the legal base for redistributing the IRA of the Local Government Units (LGUs) to the barangays, regardless of date of creation.

name: HBN-00318
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING FURTHER THE ORGANIC ACT FOR THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9054 \"AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN AND EXPAND ORGANIC ACT FOR THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6734, ENTITLED 'AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE AUTONOMOUS REGION IN MUSLIM MINDANAO', AS AMENDED\" AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00319
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 91 AND 97 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8550, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PHILIPPINE FISHERIES CODE OF 1998
congress_website_abstract: Provides stiffer penalties for violation of the provisions of this Act to curb the bleak state that plagues the country´s ocean resources.

name: HBN-00320
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE CORAZON C. AQUINO SPECIAL ECONOMIC ZONE AND FREEPORT AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00321
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE CORAZON C. AQUINO INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT AUTHORITY, TRANSFERRING EXISTING ASSETS OF THE CLARK INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT CORPORATION TO THE AUTHORITY, VESTING THE AUTHORITY WITH POWER TO ADMINISTER AND OPERATE THE CORAZON C. AQUINO INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00322
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING JUNE 15 OF EVERY YEAR AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA AND ANGELES CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE MT. PINATUBO MEMORIAL DAY

name: HBN-00263
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A LOCAL HOUSING BOARD IN EVERY CITY AND MUNICIPALITY, PROVIDING FOR ITS POWERS AND DEFINING ITS DUTIES AND FUNCTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Creates the Local Housing Board (LHB) which is primarily tasked to provide the administrative machinery that will complement efforts of shelter agencies to effect the full implementation of the law or UDHA and provide solutions to the problem of housing among many of our countrymen.

name: HBN-00264
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE ANGELINA CANAYNAY AVENUE, SAN DIONISIO, PARAÑAQUE CITY, INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF

name: HBN-00265
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE `STUDY NOW PAY LATER PLAN´ FOR POST-SECONDARY EDUCATION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to localize the Study Now Pay Later Program so that students from anywhere in the country can avail this program by simply applying in their respective local government units office.

name: HBN-00266
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING AN ADDITIONAL TWO (2) REGIONAL TRIAL COURT BRANCHES IN THE CITY OF PARAÑAQUE, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00267
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING TAX CREDITS TO ASSIST THE PRIVATE SECTOR IN ESTABLISHING NATION-WIDE PREGNANCY CARE CENTERS THAT WILL PROVIDE COUNSELING, CARE AND INFORMATION RELATED TO ALTERNATIVES TO ABORTION AND ARTIFICIAL CONTRACEPTION
congress_website_abstract: Provides tax credits to private agencies or organizations that assist the private sector in establishing nationwide pregnancy care centers providing counseling, care and information related to alternatives to abortion and artificial contraception.

name: HBN-00268
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING DISCRIMINATION AGAINST A PERSON BY REASON OF AGE UPON HIRING FOR AND DURING EMPLOYMENT, PENALIZING ANY VIOLATION THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Declares it unlawful to discriminate against any person by reason of age upon hiring for and during employment.

name: HBN-00269
title: FLORENCIO V. BERNABE SR. MEMORIAL HOSPITAL
long_title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE SERVICE CAPACITY OF THE FLORENCIO V. BERNABE SR. MEMORIAL HOSPITAL IN THE CITY OF PARANAQUE, METRO MANILA FROM A FIRST LEVEL TO SECOND LEVEL COMMUNITY HOSPITAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT UPGRADING THE SERVICE CAPACITY OF THE FLORENCIO V. BERNABE SR. MEMORIAL HOSPITAL IN THE CITY OF PARAÑAQUE, METRO MANILA FROM FIRST LEVEL TO SECOND LEVEL COMMUNITY HOSPITAL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00270
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY STO. NIÑO PARAÑAQUE CITY TO BE KNOWN AS STO.NIÑO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL PARAÑAQUE CITY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00271
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE PARAÑAQUE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - LA HUERTA ANNEX IN BARANGAY LA HUERTA, CITY OF PARAÑAQUE, METRO MANILA FROM THE PARAÑAQUE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS LA HUERTA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL PARAÑAQUE CITY, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00272
congress_website_title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE PARAÑAQUE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL - DON GALO ANNEX IN BARANGAY DON GALO, CITY OF PARAÑAQUE, METRO MANILA FROM THE PARAÑAQUE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS DON GALO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00273
title: LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE EXTENSION OFFICE (BAYAWAN CITY)
long_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BAYAWAN CITY LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) EXTENSION OFFICE INTO A REGULAR LTO DISTRICT OFFICE
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BAYAWAN CITY LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) EXTENSION OFFICE INTO A REGULAR LTO DISTRICT OFFICE

name: HBN-00274
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING AND STRENGTHENING THE PHILIPPINE RICE RESEARCH INSTITUTE AND RENAMING IT TO THE PHILIPPINE RICE AND CEREALS RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE (PhilRice)
congress_website_abstract: Creates the Philippine Cereal Research, Development and Extension Institute (PHILCEREAL) under the Department of Agriculture, which will fully work on research, development and extension (RD&E) activities for cereals in the country.

name: HBN-00275
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMOTING CORPORATE FARMING AND PROVIDING INCENTIVES THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Hopes that with the corporate farming systems in place, it can help eliminate the chain of middlemen and bring the producers and processors face-to-face so that in the long-run, it will lead to better allocative efficiency, induce higher private investment in agriculture, and result in higher outputs, income and exports.

name: HBN-00276
congress_website_title: “AN ACT REORGANIZING THE COOPERATIVE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6939, CREATING THE COOPERATIVE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY
congress_website_abstract: Empowers the Cooperative Development Authority (CDA) to enable it to perform its regulatory functions and to propel cooperatives to become more competitive and competent in pursuit of sustainable corporations and delivery of quality services.

name: HBN-00277
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ORDAIN A MICROFINANCE CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: Aims to strengthen the micro-finance sector in order to extend financial products and social services to more people under better conditions.

name: HBN-00278
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CREATION AND ORGANIZATION OF CREDIT SURETY FUND COOPERATIVES TO MANAGE AND ADMINISTER CREDIT SURETY FUNDS TO ENHANCE THE ACCESSIBILITY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTREPRENEURS, COOPERATIVES AND NON-GOVERNMENT ORGANIZATIONS TO THE CREDIT FACILITY OF BANKS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to build up the capability of member MSMEs, cooperatives and non-government organizations in the areas of credit evaluation, loan and risk management, and good governance.

name: HBN-00279
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MANNER AND DATE OF ELECTION OF SECTORAL REPRESENTATIVES TO THE LOCAL SANGGUNIANS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides for an enabling law that authorizes the election of sectoral representatives in the local legislative bodies as provided for in the Constitution.

name: HBN-00280
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONDONATION OF UNPAID INTERESTS, PENALTIES AND SURCHARGES ON LOANS SECURED BY FARMERS, FISHERFOLKS AND AGRARIAN REFORM BENEFICIARIES FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF AGRARIAN REFORM (DAR), THE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE (DA), THE PEOPLE´S CREDIT AND FINANCE CORPORATION (PCFC), THE COOPERATIVE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY (CDA), THE NATIONAL FOOD AUTHORITY (NFA) AND THE QUEDAN AND RURAL CREDIT GUARANTEE CORPORATION (QUEDANCOR)
congress_website_abstract: Authorizes the condonation of unpaid interests, penalties and surcharges on loans secured by farmers, fisherfolks and agrarian reform beneficiaries from the Department of Agrarian Reform (DAR), the Department of Agriculture (DA), the People´s Credit and Finance Corporation (PCFC), the Cooperative Development Authority (CDA), the National Food Authority (NFA) and the Quedan and Rural Credit Guarantee Corporation (QUEDANCOR).

name: HBN-00281
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MANDATORY APPOINTMENT OF COOPERATIVES OFFICERS IN EVERY LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNIT AMENDING FOR THAT PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7160, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES
congress_website_abstract: Provides for the mandatory appointment of cooperatives officers for provincial, city and municipal governments.

name: HBN-00282
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE REPRESENTATION OF COOPERATIVES IN THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS OF THE LAND BANK OF THE PHILIPPINES, AMENDING THEREFORE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBER 3844, AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: Ensures the representation of cooperatives in the Board of the Land Bank of the Philippines (LBP) thus giving them the chance that their voice will be heard in the highest policy-making body of the Bank.

name: HBN-00343
congress_website_title: AN ACT CLASSIFYING THE SERVICES OF FRANCHISE GRANTEES OF WATER UTILITIES, AND SALE OR IMPORTATION OF MACHINERY AND EQUIPMENT DIRECTLY USED IN OPERATING, MAINTAINING, IMPROVING AND EXPANDING DISTRIBUTION OF POTABLE WATER BY WATER UTILITIES AS VALUE-ADDED TAX EXEMPT TRANSACTIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 109 (1) OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9337, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to exempt water services from value-added tax (VAT) to provide relief to the domestic economy and the Filipino people.

name: HBN-00344
congress_website_title: AN ACT CLASSIFYING THE SALE OF ELECTRICITY BY GENERATION, TRANSMISSION, AND DISTRIBUTION COMPANIES AND ELECTRIC COOPERATIVES, AND THE SERVICES OF FRANCHISE GRANTEES OF ELECTRIC UTILITIES, AND SALE OR IMPORTATION OF MACHINERY AND EQUIPMENT DIRECTLY USED IN GENERATION, TRANSMISSION, AND DISTRIBUTION OF ELECTRICITY AS VALUE-ADDED TAX EXEMPT TRANSACTIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTIONS 108 (A)(ii) AND 109(1) OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9337, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Exempts electricity as a commodity from value-added tax (VAT) which is imposed on the sales of electricity by generation companies, transmission and distribution companies and the services of franchise grantees of electric utilities.

name: HBN-00345
congress_website_title: AN ACT CLASSIFYING THE SALE OR IMPORTATION OF PETROLEUM PRODUCTS AND RAW MATERIALS IN THE MANUFACTURE THEREOF AS VALUE-ADDED TAX EXEMPT TRANSACTIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 109 (1) OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8424, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE TAX REFORM ACT OF 1997, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9337, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to exempt from value -added tax (VAT) the sale or importation of petroleum products and raw materials used in the manufacture of the same.

name: HBN-00346
congress_website_title: AN ACT CLASSIFYING SERVICES RENDERED BY TOLLWAY OPERATORS AS VALUE-ADDED TAX EXEMPT TRANSACTIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 109 (1) OF THE NATIONAL INTERNAL REVENUE CODE, AS AMENDED BY REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9337, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Exempts from the value-added tax (VAT) tollway services and the fees tollway operators collect from the motorists.

name: HBN-00347
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ENSURE PUBLIC ACCESS TO OFFICIAL RECORDS, DOCUMENTS AND ANY OTHER INFORMATION OF PUBLIC CONCERN
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to eliminate the hardly comprehensible and excessively broad jargon of exemptions to the exercise of the right to official information and put in place a uniform, simple, speedy and effective means of enforcing the right to information and thereby including absolute and mandatory access to matters of official information.

name: HBN-00348
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR PROTECTION, SECURITY AND BENEFITS OF WHISTLEBLOWERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to support the people´s efforts to rid the government of corruption by setting-up a system of rewards and protection for whistleblowers and their families.

name: HBN-00349
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING CITY AND MUNICIPAL REHABILITATION CENTERS FOR CHILDREN AND YOUTH WITH DISABILITIES
congress_website_abstract: Declares it a policy of the State to provide for the rehabilitation and training of children and young adults with disabilities to ensure their right to live freely and independently and to achieve a more meaningful, productive and satisfying life.

name: HBN-00350
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROTECTING THE RIGHT OF STUDENTS OF COURSES REQUIRING PROFESSIONAL LICENSING EXAMINATIONS TO ENROLL IN REVIEW CENTERS OF THEIR CHOICE AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to ensure that students are given the chance to choose review centers that are more accessible and affordable for them and penalizes any school that compels its students to take board review classes or study in a particular review center.

name: HBN-00351
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ADDRESS THE WORSENING STATE OF THE POWER INDUSTRY IN THE PHILIPPINES, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 47 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9136, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Puts a stop to the privatization of state power assets - particularly the remaining assets still in the government hands - to help keep power rates stable and to keep what should be kept in state hands for the benefit of the Filipino people.

name: HBN-00352
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING STRATEGIC LAWSUITS AGAINST PUBLIC PARTICIPATION, PROHIBITING THE FILING THEREOF, PROVIDING MEASURES FOR ITS DISMISSAL, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to promote and protect the constitutional rights of freedom of speech, expression, and of the press, and the right of the people peaceably to assembly, and petition the government for redress of grievances; encourage and strengthen the participation of individuals in matters of public concern; prevent any abuse of the judicial process that shall curtail such participation; prohibit the filing of SLAPPs; award damages, litigation costs, attorney´s fees, and other relief to the defendant, respondent, or accused, as the case may be, upon the final and executor dismissal of SLAPPs, and; provide the defendant, respondent, or accused, as the case may be, the right to recover separate damages, litigation costs, attorney´s fees, and other relief by filing a SLAPPBack action against the complainant of a SLAPP upon final and executor dismissal of such SLAPP.

name: HBN-00353
title: FREE MOBILE DISASTER ALERTS ACT
long_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE TELECOMMUNICATIONS SERVICE PROVIDERS TO SEND FREE MOBILE ALERTS IN THE EVENT OF NATURAL AND MAN-MADE DISASTERS AND CALAMITIES
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE TELECOMMUNICATIONS SERVICE PROVIDERS TO SEND FREE MOBILE ALERTS IN THE EVENT OF NATURAL AND MAN-MADE DISASTERS AND CALAMITIES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide the citizenry with timely information and warnings through free mobile alerts in the event of natural and man-made disasters and calamities, to prevent injuries, destruction and loss of lives and property.

name: HBN-00354
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPOSING A THREE-YEAR MORATORIUM ON TUITION AND OTHER FEE INCREASES ON ALL EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS
congress_website_abstract: Imposes a three-year moratorium on all kinds of fee increases, whether tuition or other school fees, on all schools that have registered a profit in the previous year.

name: HBN-00355
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INCLUDE ETHNIC ORIGIN IN THE NATIONAL SURVEYS, CENSUSES AND OTHER DATA-GATHERING METHODS CONDUCTED BY THE NATIONAL STATISTICS OFFICE (NSO)
congress_website_abstract: Aims to include in the data related to indigenous peoples to wit, ethnicity by descent/consanguinity/blood line and language in all national surveys, censuses and other data-gathering methods.

name: HBN-00356
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE USE OF FILIPINO SIGN LANGUAGE INSETS FOR LOCAL NEWS PROGRAMS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE SECTION 22 OF REPUBLIC ACT 7277, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"MAGNA CARTA FOR PERSONS WITH DISABILITIES (PWDs)\"
congress_website_abstract: Aims to make broadcast media more accessible to the deaf community by requiring Filipino sign-language interpreted program insets to all free-to-air television stations in the country.

name: HBN-00357
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR TAX EXEMPTION AND SUBSIDIES FOR THE LOCAL MUSIC INDUSTRY AND AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE CERTAIN SECTIONS OF THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to exempt from amusement tax local artists promoting original Filipino music, to encourage and provide them support to make the industry internationally competitive.

name: HBN-00358
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE SAMAR ISLAND NATURAL PARK (SINP), SITUATED IN THE PROVINCES OF SAMAR, NORHTERN SAMAR AND EASTERN SAMAR, AS A PROTECTED AREA AND ITS PERIPHERAL AREAS AS BUFFER ZONE, PROVIDING FOR ITS MANAGEMENT AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00359
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE PRODUCTION, IMPORTATION, SALE, PROVISION, USE, RECOVERY, COLLECTION, RECYCLING AND DISPOSAL OF PLASTIC BAGS
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to regulate the production, use, recycling and disposal of plastic bags and provide for the transition in the usage of ordinary polymer plastic bags to biodegradable plastic bags in every commercial establishment, encouragement of the use of reusable bags and the provision of recovery programs in returning used plastic bags.

name: HBN-00360
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING MARINE PROTECTED AREAS IN ALL COASTAL MUNICIPALITIES AND CITIES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Mandates every coastal municipality to establish, maintain, and manage marine protected areas in at least fifteen percent (15%) of their municipal waters while preserving those marine protected areas that already exists.

name: HBN-00361
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE BENEFITS AND PRIVILEGES TO PREGNANT WOMEN AND THEIR FAMILIES, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Entitles working pregnant women to medical leave once every month for pregnancy related medical consultation in the course of their pregnancy and likewise provide them the opportunity to work flexible hours subject to certain conditions.

name: HBN-00362
title: EXEMPTING PUBLISHER FROM REVEALING THE SOURCE OF PUBLISHED INFORMATION
long_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 53, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS AN ACT TO EXEMPT THE PUBLISHER, EDITOR OR REPORTER OF ANY PUBLICATION FROM REVEALING THE SOURCE OF PUBLISHED NEWS OR INFORMATION OBTAINED IN CONFIDENCE, BY INCLUDING WITHIN ITS COVERAGE JOURNALISTS FROM BROADCAST, NEWS AGENCIES AND INTERNET PUBLICATIONS
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 53, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"AN ACT TO EXEMPT THE PUBLISHER, EDITOR OR REPORTER OF ANY PUBLICATION FROM REVEALING THE SOURCE OF PUBLISHED NEWS OR INFORMATION OBTAINED IN CONFIDENCE\" BY INCLUDING WITHIN ITS COVERAGE JOURNALISTS FROM BROADCAST, NEWS AGENCIES AND INTERNET PUBLICATIONS
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to expand the coverage on the journalists´ right to refuse to reveal the source of a confidential news report.

name: HBN-00363
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE VENUE OF THE CRIMINAL AND CIVIL ACTION IN LIBEL CASES AGAINST COMMUNITY JOURNALIST, PUBLICATIONS OR BROADCAST STATIONS
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide a specific venue of action for libel cases against a community journalist, community publication or community broadcast station.

name: HBN-00364
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A FREE BREAKFAST PROGRAM FOR PUBLIC SCHOOL CHILDREN IN DAY CARE CENTERS, PRESCHOOLS AND ELEMENTARY SCHOOLS IN THE COUNTRY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Institutionalizes the free breakfast program of the Department of Education (DepEd) for day care center, preschool and elementary school children in all public schools in the country.

name: HBN-00365
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE SALARY GRADE OF PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS FROM SALARY GRADE 11 TO 20 AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Increases the present minimum salary grade level of public school teachers in the elementary and secondary school from Grade 11 to Grade 20, provided that the salary upgrading shall be differentiated in accordance with the qualifications and length of service rendered by teachers and shall not be prejudiced by across the board adjustments.

name: HBN-00366
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN AND ENHANCE THE USE OF ENGLISH AS THE MEDIUM OF INSTRUCTION IN PHILIPPINE SCHOOLS
congress_website_abstract: Declares it a policy of the State to align the education of the young with the requirements and realities of business life and competitive in global environment by strengthening, enhancing and developing the use of the English language as the medium of instruction in all levels of education, from the preschool to the tertiary level.

name: HBN-00367
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE MANDATORY PRE-AUDIT OF GOVERNMENT DISBURSEMENTS AND USES OF FUNDS
congress_website_abstract: Requires a pre-audit of any government spending or transaction prior to the disbursement of public money and the absence of such pre-audit will render the transaction null and void.

name: HBN-00368
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOUR HUNDRED NINETY THREE (RA 493) TO INCLUDE IN THE COVERAGE OF PROHIBITION THE USE, WEARING MANUFACTURE AND SALE OF UNIFORMS AND TEXTILE OF UNIFORMS OF THE MEMBERS OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES AND THE PHILIPPINE NATIONAL POLICE, PRESCRIBING HEAVIER PENALTY FOR VIOLATION THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides a strong and effective deterrent to crimes associated with the illegal use of Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP) and Philippine National Police (PNP) uniforms by including in the coverage of the prohibition the use and wearing of military and police imitations, as well as the manufacture and sale of military or police uniforms or imitations and the textile for these uniforms.

name: HBN-00369
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A LIGHT RAIL TRANSIT (LRT) OR MONORAIL OR BUS RAPID (BRT) OR ANY OTHER APPROPRIATE MODERN MASS TRANSPORT SYSTEM IN CEBU CITY AND METRO CEBU

name: HBN-00370
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF AN UNDERSEA TUNNEL OR BRIDGE FROM CEBU CITY TO THE MUNICIPALITY OF CORDOVA - AND A COASTAL ROAD - EXPRESSWAY TO THE MACTAN-CEBU INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00371
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONSTRUCTION OF A CIRCUMFERENTIAL ROAD FROM CEBU CITY'S FIRST DISTRICT (NORTH) TO THE SECOND DISTRICT (SOUTH)

name: HBN-00372
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE METRO CEBU TRAFFIC AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00373
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE FOUR (4) BARANGAY ROAD SECTIONS OF TALAMBAN - LUSARAN ROAD, LUSARAN - ADLAON - TAPTAP ROAD, PIT-OS, GUBA - SIRAO ROAD, AND AGSUNGOT - GUBA ROAD WITHIN THE FIRST CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT OF CEBU CITY TO NATIONAL ROADS AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00374
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF VICENTE SOTTO MEMORIAL MEDICAL CENTER, LOCATED IN CEBU CITY, FROM EIGHT HUNDRED (800) TO ONE THOUSAND TWO HUNDRED (1,200) BED CAPACITY, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORE

name: HBN-00375
congress_website_title: AN ACT REESTABLISHING THE TWENTY (20) BED EXTENSION HOSPITAL II OF VICENTE SOTTO MEMORIAL CENTER (FORMERLY THE SOUTHERN ISLAND MEDICAL CENTER) AT BARANGAY GUBA, FIRST DISTRICT OF CEBU CITY, TO BE KNOWN AS KNOWN AS THE VICENTE SOTTO MEMORIAL CENTER EXTENSION HOSPITAL II AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF

name: HBN-00376
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7621 OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'AN ACT CREATING THE CEBU PORT AUTHORITY DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, PROVIDING APPROPRIATION THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES'

name: HBN-00377
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A PENAL CODE COMMISSION TO IMPLEMENT THE RE-CODIFICATION OF ALL EXISTING SUBSTANTIVE PENAL LAWS OF THE PHILIPPINES, DEFINING ITS COMPOSITION AND FUNCTIONS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Creates the Penal Code Commission which is tasked to implement the revision and re-codification of all existing substantive penal laws of the Philippines, and of codifying them in conformity with the customs and traditions of the Filipino people, and modern trends in legislation and the progressive principles of law.

name: HBN-00378
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A CIVIL CODE COMMISSION TO IMPLEMENT THE RE-CODIFICATION OF ALL EXISTING CIVIL LAWS OF THE PHILIPPINES, DEFINING ITS COMPOSITION AND FUNCTIONS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Creates the Civil Code Commission tasked to implement the revision and re-codification of all existing civil laws of the Philippines, and of codifying them in conformity with the customs and traditions of the Filipino people, and modern trends in legislation and the progressive principles of law.

name: HBN-00379
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AND PROVIDING FOR FREE COLLEGE EDUCATION TO ONE (1) PUBLIC HIGH SCHOOL GRADUATE IN A FAMILY, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Enables a qualified beneficiary to enroll in any course offerings in state college and university, free from payment of tuition and other school fees and such other incentives or subsidies as may be granted in accordance with rules and regulations to be promulgated to carry out the provisions of this Act.

name: HBN-00380
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE 2010 COMMERCIAL CODE COMMISSION TO IMPLEMENT THE CODIFICATION OF ALL EXISTING COMMERCIAL LAWS OF THE PHILIPPINES, DEFINING ITS COMPOSITION AND FUNCTIONS, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Creates the Commercial Code Commission tasked to implement the revision and re-codification of all existing substantive commercial laws of the Philippines and of codifying them in conformity with the customs and traditions of the Filipino people, and modern trends in legislation and the progressive principles of law.

name: HBN-00381
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE NATIONAL SANITATION COORDINATING COUNCIL THAT SHALL PROVIDE FOR A NATIONWIDE PROGRAM AND MANAGEMENT OF SUSTAINABLE SANITATION AND OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to address the nationwide problem of sanitation and waste disposal by unifying and integrating agencies concerned in sanitation, and establishing institutional responsibility and capability fro sustainable sanitation.

name: HBN-00382
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 6 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7941, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PARTYLIST SYSTEM ACT
congress_website_abstract: Provides for clear procedures, rules, and timeline for disqualification and removal or cancellation of registration of party-list groups.

name: HBN-00423
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSURING THAT GOVERNMENT SPECIAL HOSPITALS, MEDICAL CENTERS, INSTITUTES OR SANITARIA EFFECTIVELY IMPLEMENT \"PAY-WHAT-YOU-CAN POLICY\" FOR POOR PATIENTS FOR THEIR TREATMENT, CONFINEMENT OR HOSPITALIZATION, AND HEALING AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Accords every poor patient seeking diagnosis, treatment and cure from disease or illness to be entitled to the policy of a government special hospital, medical center, institute or sanitarium duly authorized to implement the new “pay-what-you-can” policy.

name: HBN-00424
congress_website_title: AN ACT AUTHORIZING THE DEPARTMENT OF BUDGET AND MANAGEMENT TO EARMARK SUFFICIENT FUNDS FOR GRANT TO GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES AT BOTH THE NATIONAL AND LOCAL LEVELS AND PRESCRIBING GUIDELINES THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to make available funds for the purpose of granting qualified government employees at both the national or local levels a form of financial assistance when they become victims of disasters, calamities, emergencies or similar crises.

name: HBN-00425
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING EVERY MAJOR BUSINESS ESTABLISHMENT LOCATED IN CENTRAL OR CORE BUSINESS DISTRICT OR AREA, ON COMPULSORY BASIS, TO INSTALL IN ITS PLACE OF BUSINESS OPERATION, A CLOSED CIRCUIT TELEVISION CAMERA AND EVERY MINOR BUSINESS ESTABLISHMENT, ON OPTIONAL BASIS AND PRESCRIBING EFFECTIVE GUIDELINES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Requires all major business establishments, especially those that are located in central and core business districts or areas to install, on compulsory basis, a Closed Circuit Television Cameras (CCTVs) and on optional basis, minor business establishments.

name: HBN-00426
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONSTITUTING THE COMMISSION ON AUDIT (COA), OFFICE OF THE OMBUDSMAN, AND COMMITTEE ON OVERSIGHT OF CONGRESS INTO A TRIPARTITE BODY TO BE KNOWN AS THE LEGISLATIVE AUDIT COUNCIL TO PERFORM IDENTIFIED TASKS ENABLING GOVERNMENT TO EFFECTIVELY RUN AFTER CORRUPT OFFICIALS AND PRIVATE INDIVIDUALS AND MADE THEM TO ACCOUNT FOR EMBEZZLEMENT OF PUBLIC FUNDS
congress_website_abstract: Constitutes the Commission of Audit (COA), Office of the Ombudsman, and Committee on Oversight of Congress as a tripartite body to be known as the “Legislative Audit Council” with the task of enabling the government to effectively run after corrupt officials and private individuals and make them to account for embezzlement of public funds.

name: HBN-00427
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING LICENSE AND CLEARANCE FROM PROFESSIONAL REGULATION COMMISSION FOR THE PRACTICE OF OPTOMETRY AND OPERATION OF OPTICAL SHOPS, RESPECTIVELY AND THE SAME TO BE STRICTLY ENFORCED BY THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNIT CONCERNED AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Requires that the practice of optometry be closely monitored by the Professional Regulation Commission (PRC) which alone can issue professional licenses and for it to issue agency clearance before optical shops or similar business establishments be issued Mayor´s Permit or Business License by the concerned Local Government Unit (LGU).

name: HBN-00428
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE CERTIFICATION OF INALIENABLE GOVERNMENT-OWNED PROPERTIES AND ASSETS
congress_website_abstract: Mandates an inventory of government-owned properties and assets and their classification into what is alienable.

name: HBN-00429
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10176, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"AN ACT REVIVING THE OBSERVANCE OF ARBOR DAY BY AUTHORIZING THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS THE RESPONSIBILITIES FOR CELEBRATING THE DAY FOR TREE PLANTING AS AN ANNUAL EVENT\"
congress_website_abstract: Hopes to heighten public awareness on the issue of climate change and environment protection by reviving the observance of the annual Arbor Day which is set on the last Monday of June and mandating public elementary and high schools to observe the same.

name: HBN-00430
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE JUNCTION NATIONAL ROAD MURCIA - BRGY. CONCEPCION - JUNCTION NATIONAL ROAD TALISAY CITY, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00431
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE CARLOS HILADO MEMORIAL STATE COLLEGE IN THE CITY OF TALISAY, NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, INTO A STATE UNIVERSITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CARLOS HILADO STATE UNIVERSITY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00432
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A SEPARATE CITY SCHOOLS DIVISION OFFICE IN THE CITY OF VICTORIAS, PROVINCE OF NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NUMBER 8488, ENTITLED \"AN ACT CONVERTING THE MUNICIPALITY OF VICTORIAS, NEGROS OCCIDENTAL, INTO A COMPONENT CITY TO BE KNOWN AS THE CITY OF VICTORIAS\"

name: HBN-00433
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF NAGUILIAN DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN NAGUILIAN, LA UNION, FROM TWENTY FIVE (25) TO FIFTY (50), UPGRADING ITS SERVICES AND FACILITIES AND PROFESSIONAL HEALTH CARE, AUTHORIZING THE INCREASE OF ITS MEDICAL PERSONNEL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00434
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE ROSARIO-TUBAO ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF LA UNION INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

name: HBN-00435
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NAGUILIAN-CABA ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF LA UNION INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

name: HBN-00436
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE NAGUILIAN-BAGULIN ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF LA UNION INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

name: HBN-00437
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE AGOO-STO. TOMAS-TUBAO ROAD IN THE PROVINCE OF LA UNION INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

name: HBN-00438
title: DR. MANUEL T. CASES SR. NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL
long_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN MANUEL NORTE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION TO DR. MANUEL T. CASES SR. NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL
congress_website_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN MANUEL NORTE NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION TO DR. MANUEL T. CASES, SR. MEMORIAL NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

name: HBN-00439
title: DR. MANUEL T. CASES SR. ELEMENTARY SCHOOL
long_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN MANUEL NORTE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION TO DR. MANUEL T. CASES SR. ELEMENTARY SCHOOL
congress_website_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN MANUEL NORTE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION TO DR. MANUEL T. CASES, SR. ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

name: HBN-00440
title: SAN MANUEL SUR ELEMENTARY SCHOOL
long_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BAYBAY ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN MANUEL SUR, MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION TO SAN MANUEL SUR ELEMENTARY SCHOOL
congress_website_title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF BAYBAY ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY SAN MANUEL SUR, MUNICIPALITY OF AGOO, PROVINCE OF LA UNION TO SAN MANUEL SUR ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

name: HBN-00441
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING FREE POST-SECONDARY EDUCATION IN STATE UNIVERSITIES AND COLLEGES AND PUBLIC TECHNICAL AND VOCATIONAL SCHOOLS TO DEPENDENT CHILDREN OF PUBLIC ELEMENTARY AND HIGH SCHOOL TEACHERS
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to meet the avowed policy of the Magna Carta for Public School Teachers by uplifting their economic condition, through the provision of a non-wage benefit in the form of free tuition and other fees for their dependent children who are admitted to public post-secondary education institutions.

name: HBN-00442
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE HIRING OF TEACHERS IN THE PUBLIC SECTOR THROUGH CONTRACTS OF SERVICE OR JOB ORDERS
congress_website_abstract: Prohibits the hiring of teachers at all levels through contracts of service or job orders to carry out the duties and functions of regular teaching staff, with the exception of faculty in post-secondary education institutions where the required highly specialized or technical expertise cannot be provided by the regular teaching staff.

name: HBN-00403
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING ALL GOVERNMENT-ISSUED IDENTIFICATION CARDS, CERTIFICATES AND LICENSES TO INCLUDE A PORTION INDICATING THE BLOOD TYPE OF THE HOLDER AND PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Requires government agencies issuing licenses, certificates and identification cards to bear the blood type of the owner of such documents to allow immediate action or transfusion response in particular during medical emergencies and in times of disaster.

name: HBN-00404
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A NATIONAL MENTAL HEALTH CARE DELIVERY SYSTEM, ESTABLISHING FOR THE PURPOSE THE NATIONAL MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE FOR MENTAL HEALTH AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to adopt an integrated and comprehensive approach to the development of the National Mental Health Care Delivery System to deliver appropriate services and interventions including provision of mental health protection, care, treatment and other essential services to those with mental illness or disability.

name: HBN-00405
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE CRIME OF SEXUAL INFIDELITY AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLE 333 (ADULTERY), ARTICLE 334 (CONCUBINAGE) AND ARTICLE 344 AND 345 OF TITLE ELEVEN, BOOK II OF ACT NO. 3815, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_abstract: Proposes to eradicate the discrepancy in penalties for related crimes such as concubinage and adultery as it imposes equal punishment for married men and women who are found to be unfaithful to their spouses.

name: HBN-00406
congress_website_title: AN ACT ADDRESSING THE SYSTEM OF PROSTITUTION, IMPOSING PENALTIES ON ITS PERPETRATORS, PROVIDING PROTECTIVE MEASURES AND SUPPORT SERVICES FOR ITS VICTIMS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLES 202 AND 341 OF THE REVISED PENAL CODE
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to propose measures to help prostituted persons by entitling them to government services accorded to victims of violence against women, such as medical services, counseling, shelter, protection, legal services and livelihood training, among others.

name: HBN-00407
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING THE SEVENTEENTH OF NOVEMBER OF EVERY YEAR AS NATIONAL STUDENTS' DAY

name: HBN-00408
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO COMBAT ABUSE AND ENHANCE PENALTIES FOR CRIMES AGAINST AND TO STRENGTHEN GOVERNMENT SERVICE AND SUPPORT MECHANISMS FOR SENIORS
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to develop strategies for preventing and punishing crimes that target or otherwise disproportionately affects seniors, by collecting appropriate data to measure the extent of crimes committed against seniors and determine the extent of domestic or elder abuse.

name: HBN-00409
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING PUBLIC AND PRIVATE HOSPITALS FROM REQUIRING THE PAYMENT OF MONEY UPON REGISTERED NURSES WHO WANT TO GAIN WORK EXPERIENCE AND PENALIZING ANY VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to prevent the exploitation of registered nurses who are serving as nurse volunteers in any public or private hospital by mandating the Department of Health (DOH) and the Professional Regulation Commission (PRC) Board of Nursing to assess all the training programs for registered nurses that are being implemented in hospitals.

name: HBN-00410
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE DEVELOPMENT OF ENTREPRENEURSHIP SKILLS AMONG GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES FOR AN INNOVATION-INSPIRED CORPS OF CIVIL SERVANTS AND PRODUCTIVE POST-SERVICE CITIZENRY
congress_website_abstract: Provides post-service assistance program for purposes of allowing the retirees of government agencies to further evaluate and take advantage of business opportunities which can help them improve their living conditions after their retirement from government office.

name: HBN-00411
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROHIBIT EMPLOYERS, LABOR CONTRACTORS AND LABOR ORGANIZATIONS FROM DISCRIMINATING AGAINST ANY INDIVIDUAL BECAUSE OF AGE
congress_website_abstract: Provides for sanctions to employers, labor contractors and labor organizations who discriminate against employees or job seekers on account of their age in all the aspects of employment - recruitment, employment terms and conditions, promotions and transfers, training and dismissals.

name: HBN-00412
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR REPRESENTATION IN ALL LEVELS OF LOCAL GOVERNMENT FOR SENIOR CITIZENS, CREATING THE SANGGUNIANG SENIOR CITIZENS, THE KATIPUNAN NG SENIOR CITIZENS, PROVIDING FOR THEIR POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PERTINENT SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7610, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Enables the senior citizens and the elderly to be properly represented in government and continue to perform an active role in nation building by creating the position of Senior Citizens Sanggunian which shall be elected from the barangay level, similar to the Sangguniang Kabataan.

name: HBN-00413
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMOTING UPLAND AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTING AN UPLAND DEVELOPMENT PROGRAM, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to replicate and continue the Upland Development Program (UDP) in other local governments around the country by mandating the Department of Agriculture (DA) to conduct ground surveys and mapping of all areas identified for development and to provide technical extension services in the development of individual upland farm and provision of the same on nursery and reforestation techniques, agroforestry methods, assisted natural regeneration and forest enrichment planting practices, and forest fire management.

name: HBN-00414
congress_website_title: AN ACT MAKING FIRST TIME HOME OWNERSHIP EASIER AND MORE AFFORDABLE BY MAKING THE COST OF THE PURCHASE CHEAPER, REDUCING THE FINANCING COST, EXEMPTING THE PURCHASE FROM TAXATION, ENHANCING PRIVATE SECTOR PARTICIPATION IN HOUSING CONSTRUCTION AND FINANCING, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Entitles real estate companies that grant a discount of a minimum of ten percent (10%) of the prevailing sale value of their real estate units to first time home buyers, to fiscal, non fiscal and other incentives.

name: HBN-00415
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROTECTING THE WELFARE OF REGISTERED NURSES BY PROHIBITING PUBLIC AND PRIVATE HOSPITALS FROM CHARGING OR REQUIRING THE PAYMENT OF MONEY FOR VOLUNTEER OR TRAINING WORK, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATION THEREOF, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Prohibits and penalizes hospitals, both private and public, from demanding payment from nurses in exchange for gaining necessary skills training or work experience required for work abroad.

name: HBN-00416
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE BOHOL PORTS AUTHORITY, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, PROVIDING APPROPRIATIONS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00417
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE AGRI SCHOLARSHIP FOR AGRIBUSINESS AND ENTREPRENEURSHIP PROGRAMS IN THE AGRICULTURAL CURRICULA OF STATE UNIVERSITIES AND COLLEGES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Aims to provide opportunities to poor but deserving high school students, as well as graduate students, to pursue careers in agriculture as successful entrepreneurs and agribusiness founders and managers.

name: HBN-00418
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE PHILIPPINE CROP INSURANCE SYSTEM BY EXPANDING ITS PROGRAM COVERAGE, INCREASING ITS FUNDING SOURCE AND IMPOSING HEAVIER PENALTIES ON SPURIOUS CLAIMS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1467, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CHARTER OF THE PHILIPPINE CROP INSURANCE CORPORATION (PCIP)
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to extend the insurance coverage to fishpond and fish cage operators and other aquaculture projects; increase the insurance coverage´s funding requirements by requiring the PAGCOR to earmark one-half percent (0.05%) of its earnings to the program, and; impose heavier penalties to spurious claimants.

name: HBN-00419
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MODERNIZATION OF THE PHILIPPINE ATMOSPHERIC, GEOPHYSICAL AND ASTRONOMICAL SERVICES ADMINISTRATION (PAGASA), PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFORE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to modernize the equipment and facilities of PAGASA, further train its personnel, and increase the base pay and benefits of its officials and personnel to improve the agency´s services and enhance professionalism and patriotism among its employees.

name: HBN-00420
congress_website_title: AN ACT MAKING THE APPOINTMENT TO THE POSITIONS OF LOCAL AGRICULTURIST, ENVIRONMENT AND NATURAL RESOURCES OFFICER AND SOCIAL WELFARE AND DEVELOPMENT OFFICER, MANDATORY IN ALL LOCAL GOVERNMENT UNITS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PERTINENT SECTION OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7610, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT CODE OF 1991, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
