congress_website_abstract: Proposes to make the appointment of the positions of Environment and Natural Resources Officer and Social Welfare Development Officers mandatory in all local government units (LGUs).

name: HBN-00421
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING PROTECTION TO CONSUMERS BY STABILIZING PRICES OF PETROLEUM PRODUCTS DURING EMERGENCY SITUATIONS, MANDATING ITS INCLUSION AS A PRIME COMMODITY UNDER THE COVERAGE OF THE PRICE ACT, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PERTINENT PROVISIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7581, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PRICE ACT, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Declares it illegal for oil companies to engage in the following: 1) hoarding or the undue accumulation of fuel product beyond normal inventory levels, and the refusal or failure to sell the same; 2) profiteering or selling the petroleum products as a price grossly in excess of its true worth; and, 3) cartel, which is a combination of or agreement between two (2) or more persons to artificially and unreasonably increase of manipulate its price.

name: HBN-00422
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING PERTINENT PROVISION OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9507 THEREBY EXTENDING COVERAGE OF THE RESTRUCTURING PROGRAM FOR DELINQUENT SOCIALIZED AND LOW-COST HOUSING LOAN ACCOUNTS FOR A PERIOD OF ANOTHER TWENTY FOUR (24) MONTHS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to institute a rational loan restructuring and condonation program that considers the credit worthiness and discipline of borrowers as well as the financial viability of lending institution.

name: HBN-00383
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE BARANGAY IPIL, SURIGAO CITY - SAN FRANCISO - MALIMONO - MAINIT PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF SAN FRANCISCO, MALIMONO AND MAINIT AND IN THE CITY OF SURIGAO, PROVINCE OF SURIGAO DEL NORTE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

name: HBN-00384
congress_website_title: AN ACT MANDATING THE REGISTRATION OF MOTORCYCLE HELMETS AT THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) THROUGH THE USE OF REFLECTIVE STICKERS OF PLATE NUMBERS AND ALLOCATING FUNDS GENERATED TO MOTORCYCLE ROAD SAFETY PROGRAMS TO BE IDENTIFIED BY CONGRESS
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to rid of the continuous crimes involving motorcycles.

name: HBN-00385
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING AND INSTITUTING A GOVERNMENT PROTECTION AND SECURITY SERVICE (GPSS)
congress_website_abstract: Converts the existing Presidential Security Group (PSG) into a highly professionalized civilian security organization to be named the Government Protection and Security Service (GPSS) to insulate the organization form partisan politics while maximizing its efficiency and effectiveness.

name: HBN-00386
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 7 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 8981, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE PRC MODERNIZATION ACT OF 2000, PROVIDING FOR THE INCLUSION IN THE PRC POWERS, FUNCTIONS, AND RESPONSIBILITIES THE REGULATION OF THE ESTABLISHMENT AND OPERATION OF LICENSURE EXAMINATION REVIEW CENTERS AND SIMILAR ENTITIES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to protect the public against substandard review centers and unethical practices committed by some review centers and similar entities.

name: HBN-00387
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING INCENTIVES FOR THE MANUFACTURE, ASSEMBLY, AND IMPORTATION OF ELECTRIC, HYBRID AND OTHER ALTERNATIVE FUEL VEHICLES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Defines electric vehicle (EV) as vehicle using electric motors solely for propulsion, hybrid vehicle (HV) as vehicle that combines the technologies of using internal combustion engine (ICE) with a battery-powered motor to gain advantages of both propulsion systems, and alternative fuel vehicle (AFV) as vehicle using alternative sources of energy such as, but not limited to, solar, wind, hydrogen fuel cell, compressed natural gas (CNG) or liquefied natural gas (LNG) and liquefied petroleum gas (LPG), other than conventional sources of energy like petroleum and gasoline for propulsion.

name: HBN-00388
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING ANTI-COMPETITIVE AGREEMENTS, ABUSE OF DOMINANT POSITION, AND ANTI-COMPETITIVE MERGERS, ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE FAIR COMPETITION COMMISSION AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Penalizes monopolies, cartels and unfair competitions to protect the consumers from abuses of market powers, and; establishes the Fair Trade Commission.

name: HBN-00389
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE POLITICAL PARTY SYSTEM, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to institutionalize and strengthen political parties in the country by introducing reforms in campaign financing and provide financial subsidies to political parties to augment their expenditures for campaign.

name: HBN-00390
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN THE COMPETITIVENESS OF THE PHILIPPINE MOTOR VEHICLE MANUFACTURING INDUSTRY
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to develop a comprehensive national policy that will accelerate the sound development of the Philippine Motor Vehicle Manufacturing Industry thereby contributing to industrial capital formation and employment generation.

name: HBN-00391
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN \"ADOPT-A-WILDLIFE SPECIES PROGRAM\", PROVIDING INCENTIVES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Establishes an “Adopt-a-Wildlife Species Program” in all appropriate areas of the country with the active participation, involvement and assistance of the local government units (LGUs), nongovernment organizations (NGOs), people´s organizations (POs), civil society groups, and private individuals.

name: HBN-00392
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A GREEN ENERGY FOR HOMES AND BUILDINGS PROGRAM IN THE DEPARTMENT OF ENERGY TO PROVIDE FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE TO PROMOTE RESIDENTIAL, COMMERCIAL, AND INDUSTRIAL SCALE ENERGY EFFICIENCY AND ON-SITE RENEWABLE TECHNOLOGIES
congress_website_abstract: Defines green energy as sources of energy that are natural; considered to be environmentally friendly and non-polluting, which include, but not limited to, anaerobic digestion, geothermal power, wind power, small-scale hydropower, solar energy biomass power, tidal power, and wave power.

name: HBN-00393
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A COMPREHENSIVE HAZARDOUS AND RADIOACTIVE WASTES MANAGEMENT, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00394
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE PRODUCTION, IMPORTATION, SALE, PROVISION, USE, RECOVERY, COLLECTION, RECYCLING, AND DISPOSAL OF PLASTIC BAGS
congress_website_abstract: Mandates the placement of a plastic bag recovery bin at each store or cluster of stores which shall be visible and accessible to customers.

name: HBN-00395
title: SUBDIVISION AND CONDOMINIUM BUYERS' PROTECTIVE DECREE AMENDMENTS OF 2014
long_title: AN ACT TO INSTITUTE REFORMS IN THE SUBDIVISION AND CONDOMINIUM BUYERS' PROTECTIVE DECREE
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO INSTITUTE REFORMS IN THE SUBDIVISION AND CONDOMINIUM BUYERS' PROTECTIVE DECREE
congress_website_abstract: Increases the penalties to land and condominium developers who fail to complete the development of the project within the prescribed period to deliver the title to the paid owner.

name: HBN-00396
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE REGULATORY FRAMEWORK FOR THE SAFE OPERATIONS OF THE LIQUEFIED PETROLEUM GAS (LPG) INDUSTRY, PROVIDE ADDITIONAL POWERS TO THE DEPARTMENT OF ENERGY, DEFINE AND PENALIZE CERTAIN ACTS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00397
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING MEASURES TO ENSURE THE SAFETY OF CHILDREN ABOARD MOTORCYCLES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to prohibit any person from transporting children below the age of ten (10) on a motorcycle along highways unless the child is wearing a standard protective helmet as provided by Law.

name: HBN-00398
title: PREGNANCY TESTING OF ALL WOMEN OF CHILDBEARING AGE WHO WILL UNDERGO COSMETIC SURGERY
long_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MANDATORY PREGNANCY TESTING OF ALL WOMEN OF CHILDBEARING AGE WHO WILL UNDERGO COSMETIC SURGERY, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE MANDATORY PREGNANCY TESTING OF ALL WOMEN OF CHILDBEARING AGE WHO WILL UNDERGO COSMETIC SURGERY, PROVIDING PENALTIES THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to ensure the well being of pregnant women and to prevent the unborn child from any harmful effects that may be caused by cosmetic surgery procedures.

name: HBN-00399
congress_website_title: AN ACT EXPANDING THE PROHIBITED ACTS OF DISCRIMINATION AGAINST WOMEN ON ACCOUNT OF SEX, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE ARTICLES 135 AND 137 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 442, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"LABOR CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES\"
congress_website_abstract: Declares it unlawful for any employer to favor a male employee over a female employee with respect to dismissal of personnel or the application of any retrenchment policy of the company solely on the account of their sex.

name: HBN-00400
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE USE OF HAD-HELD MOBILE COMMUNICATION DEVICES WHILE DRIVING AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Prohibits the use of mobile communications devices by motorists while driving or operating a moving motor vehicle to promote road safety.

name: HBN-00401
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING RACIAL, ETHNIC, AND RELIGIOUS DISCRIMINATION
congress_website_abstract: Penalizes the acts of discrimination, profiling, violence and all forms of intolerance in employment, education, delivery of goods, facilities and services, accommodation, transportation, media, in search and investigatory activities, and in political, civil, cultural and social life on the basis of ethnicity, race, religion or belief, sex, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, language, disability and other status.

name: HBN-00402
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTIONALIZING A PRE-HOSPITAL EMERGENCY MEDICAL CARE SYSTEM, PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT, SUPERVISION AND REGULATION OF THE PRE-HOSPITAL EMERGENCY CARE PROFESSION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to set up a climate conducive to the practice of the pre-hospital emergency care and maximize the capability and potential of emergency medical technicians and other pre-hospital care professionals and institute a standard system of pre-hospital emergency medical services in the country.

name: HBN-00443
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING CLASS SIZE IN ALL PUBLIC SCHOOLS AND APPOINTING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Mandates the regulation of class size in public schools up to a maximum of 50 students and prescribing additional compensation for teachers handling large classes.

name: HBN-00444
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 13 OF REPUBLIC ACT 6646, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE ELECTORAL REFORMS LAW OF 1987,\" MAKING ELECTION SERVICE VOLUNTARY FOR PUBLIC SCHOOL TEACHERS AND OTHER CITIZENS
congress_website_abstract: Provides that volunteers should be registered voters of the city or municipality where they wish to serve on election day, in accordance with the following order of preference: 1. Public school teachers; 2. Private school teachers; 3. Employees of the government, or; 4. Citizens of known probity and competence.

name: HBN-00445
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING OCTOBER 5 OF EVERY YEAR AS \"NATIONAL TEACHERS' DAY\"

name: HBN-00446
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT 10175, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE \"CYBERCRIME PREVENTION ACT OF 2012\"
congress_website_abstract: Removes from the provisions of Republic Act No. 10175, or the Cybercrime Prevention Act of 2012, which endanger fundamental freedoms, particularly the right to free speech.

name: HBN-00447
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTION 8 OF REPUBLIC ACT 6426, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"THE FOREIGN CURRENCY DEPOSIT ACT OF THE PHILIPPINES\"
congress_website_abstract: Prohibits that foreign currency deposits be examined, inquired or looked into by any person, government official, bureau or office whether judicial or administrative or legislative, or any other entity whether public or private, except upon the written permission of the depositor, or in cases of impeachment, or upon order of a competent court in cases of bribery or dereliction of duty of public officials, or in cases where the money deposited or invested is the subject of the litigation.

name: HBN-00448
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING FEBRUARY FOUR OF EVERY YEAR AS \"PHILIPPINE-AMERICAN WAR DAY\"

name: HBN-00449
congress_website_title: AN ACT WITHHOLDING OPERATIONAL FUNDS OF UNITS OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES IMPLICATED IN GROSS HUMAN RIGHTS VIOLATIONS
congress_website_abstract: Encourages the Armed Force of the Philippines (AFP) chain of command to ensure that their units uphold and respect human rights at all times in the discharge of their duties, especially during counterinsurgency operations.

name: HBN-00450
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING FILIPINO SIGN LANGUAGE AS THE NATIONAL SIGN LANGUAGE OF THE FILIPINO DEAF AND THE OFFICIAL LANGUAGE OF GOVERNMENT IN ALL TRANSACTIONS INVOLVING THE DEAF, AND MANDATING ITS USE IN SCHOOLS, BROADCAST MEDIA, AND WORKPLACES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to realize the rights of the Filipino Deaf to full and equal participation in society by enabling the acquisition of life and social development skills through the use Filipino Sign Language (FSL) as the language of instruction, in an environment which respects their identity and distinct capabilities.

name: HBN-00451
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER LIBERALIZING THE COMMERCIAL AVIATION INDUSTRY OF THE PHILIPPINES BY ALIGNING EXISTING POLICIES, RULES AND REGULATIONS
congress_website_abstract: Aims to institutionalize a pocket open skies policy in the country by fully opening its secondary gateways (excluding the NAIA) to foreign airline operations and seeks to replicate the economic gains in terms of tourism, exports, investment and job growth across the country.

name: HBN-00452
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A MAGNA CARTA OF THE POOR

name: HBN-00453
congress_website_title: AN ACT PENALIZING ANTI-COMPETITIVE AGREEMENTS, ABUSE OF DOMINANT POSITION, AND ANTI-COMPETITIVE MERGERS, ESTABLISHING THE PHILIPPINE FAIR COMPETITION COMMISSION AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00454
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING MANUFACTURERS, PACKERS AND DISTRIBUTORS OF FOOD PRODUCTS, AND RESTAURANT AND FAST-FOOD CHAIN OPERATORS TO SPECIFY IN THEIR RESPECTIVE FOOD LABELS, PACKAGES OR CONTAINERS THE NUTRITION INFORMATION OF EACH PRODUCT AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7394, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE 'CONSUMER ACT OF THE PHILIPPINES'
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to promote health awareness among the public by requiring the concerned entities to provide for nutrition labels of food products.

name: HBN-00455
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE LADDERIZED INTERFACE BETWEEN TECHNICAL-VOCATIONAL EDUCATION AND TRAINING AND HIGHER EDUCATION

name: HBN-00456
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING THE IMPOSITION OF ANY FEE FOR THE USE OF PARKING SPACES AND FACILITIES LOCATED WITHIN SHOPPING MALLS, HOTELS AND SIMILAR COMMERCIAL ESTABLISHMENTS, AND PRESCRIBING PENALTIES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to prohibit the charging of any fee for use of parking spaces in shopping malls, hotels and similar commercial establishments.

name: HBN-00457
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING REHABILITATION CENTERS FOR CHILDREN AND YOUTH WITH DISABILITIES NATIONWIDE
congress_website_abstract: Aims to institutionalize the establishment of Stimulation and Therapeutic Activity Centers (STACs) in all cities and municipalities for the empowerment of children and young adults with disabilities as well as the communities they live in.

name: HBN-00458
title: CIVIL AERONAUTICS ACT OF THE PHILIPPINES
long_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 10, 11, 22 AND 24 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 776, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CIVIL AERONAUTICS ACT OF THE PHILIPPINES, AS AMENDED
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 10, 11, 22 AND 24 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 776, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'THE CIVIL AERONAUTICS ACT OF THE PHILIPPINES', AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: Returns the inherent right of Congress to regulate public utilities including public transportation.

name: HBN-00459
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING THE TYPOLOGY OF HIGHER EDUCATION INSTITUTIONS
congress_website_abstract: Institutionalizes typology (a system for classifying higher education institutions (HEIs) that shall guide government officials and leaders in rationalizing the distribution and operation of HEIs in the country) by HEIs into research university, specialized research university, teaching university, specialized college and associate college, thus minimizing program duplication between and among HEIs - between public and private HEIs, among State Universities and Colleges (SUCs), and among branches within the SUCs.

name: HBN-00460
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE NATIONAL MANGROVE CONSERVATION AND REHABILITATION PROGRAM COVERING ALL MANGROVE AREAS IN THE COUNTRY, AND PROVIDING INSTITUTIONAL SUPPORT AND INCENTIVES THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Declares it a policy of the State to secure the protection, conservation and rehabilitation of all mangrove areas in the country to ensure that its use and enjoyment are consistent with the key principles of sustainable development and at the same time, maintaining a balanced ecosystem for the benefit of the Filipino people.

name: HBN-00461
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE NATIONAL FOOD AUTHORITY, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Aims to strengthen and continue the operations of the National Food Authority (NFA) through the following measures: 1. provide a clean bill of health through mechanisms that transfer liabilities to a Board of Liquidators created which shall handle the disposition and liquidation of its assets; 2. the provision of initial capitalization which shall be provided by law (GAA); 3. The government through the Department of Budget Management shall include in the President´s budget proposal funds to be utilized for personal services, interests and other maintenance and operating expenses to maintain its function at ensuring its buffer stock of rice; 4. Provide for the necessary structural changes as a result of delimiting its functions to the maintenance of the country´s buffer stock of rice.

name: HBN-00462
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO SPUR RURAL DEVELOPMENT BY STRENGTHENING PHILIPPINE AGRICULTURE THROUGH A BALANCED FARM, FOOD, TRADE AND DEVELOPMENT POLICIES, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREOF AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to foster coherence in the country´s trade, agricultural and rural development policies and to help transform small farmers and agrarian reform beneficiaries (ARBs) into agribusiness champions under globalization.

name: HBN-00483
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE THE MANUFACTURE, IMPORTATION, SALE, DISTRIBUTION, USE AND DEVELOPMENT OF HYBRID AND ALTERNATIVE FUEL VEHICLES BY GRANTING TAX EXEMPTIONS AND PROVIDING INCENTIVES THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Declares it a policy of the State to promote the manufacture, importation, sale, distribution, use and development of hybrid or alternative fuel vehicles in furtherance of the objectives of Clean Air Act, to achieve better quality of air through the reduction of air pollutants produced by the present crop of vehicles now plying the roads, and the subsequent reduction of such vehicles in the long run.

name: HBN-00484
congress_website_title: AN ACT INCREASING THE PENALTY IMPOSED AGAINST POLLUTERS OF NAVIGABLE WATERS BY AMENDING SECTION 7 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 979
congress_website_abstract: Provides stiffer civil and criminal penalties against those polluters of our marine environment since we are very dependent on the sea and other bodies of water for our transportation, livelihood and other related industries.

name: HBN-00485
congress_website_title: AN ACT IMPLEMENTING THE RIGHT OF THE PEOPLE TO INFORMATION ON MATTERS OF PUBLIC CONCERN GUARANTEED UNDER SECTION SEVEN, ARTICLE THREE OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION AND THE STATE POLICY OF FULL PUBLIC DISCLOSURE OF ALL ITS TRANSACTIONS INVOLVING PUBLIC INTEREST UNDER SECTION TWENTY-EIGHT, ARTICLE TWO OF THE 1987 CONSTITUTION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to ensure that the State shall remain fully accountable to the people by: a) providing for disclosure of all government information in order to facilitate informed public participation in policy formulation and promote transparency and fairness in government decision-making; and b) giving the people the right to access to information and matters involving public interest and public concern.

name: HBN-00486
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING A NATIONAL LAND USE POLICY, PROVIDING THE IMPLEMENTING MECHANISMS THEREFORE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Aims to provide the overall framework for the rational allocation, disposition, sustainable use, and management of land resources for a variety of ecological and economic uses, and to prevent premature conversion of agricultural lands and for other uses.

name: HBN-00487
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE GROUNDS FOR IMPEACHMENT AS PROVIDED IN THE 1987 CONSTITUTION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00488
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE SELECTION OF AN ACTING PRESIDENT AND ACTING VICE PRESIDENT OF THE REPUBLIC OF THE PHILIPPINES IN CASE OF A FAILURE OF ELECTION
congress_website_abstract: Provides for the manner in which one who is to act as President shall be selected until a President or a Vice-President shall have qualified, in case of death, permanent disability, or the inability of the Senate President or the Speaker of the House of Representatives to take over as Acting President.

name: HBN-00489
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A MECHANISM FOR THE NATIONAL IDENTIFICATION SYSTEM IN THE PHILIPPINES, PROVIDING FOR BENEFITS, RIGHTS AND CORRESPONDING OBLIGATIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to establish a National Identification Card System (NICS) which shall serve as a valid proof of identity of the person indicated on the card.

name: HBN-00490
congress_website_title: AN ACT INSTITUTING REFORMS IN REAL PROPERTY VALUATION IN THE PHILIPPINES, ESTABLISHING THE NATIONAL VALUATION AUTHORITY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to promote the development and maintenance of a just, equitable, impartial and nationally consistent real property valuation based on internationally accepted valuation standards, concepts, principles and practices.

name: HBN-00491
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE DEBT MANAGEMENT BOARD, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Declares it a policy of the State to implement a sound and effective debt management system and strategies as an integral part of the country´s overall macroeconomic management and public administration.

name: HBN-00492
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING THE GRANTING OF REWARDS AND PROTECTION TO THOSE WHO WILL REPORT MALFEASANCE IN GOVERNMENT OFFICES AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Grants a reward or incentive to a government employee who report any act of malfeasance committed by his superior or any of his co-employees, in terms of cash, bonus or promotion in rank, if qualified, and shall be provided protection against any retaliation from erring officials or employees.

name: HBN-00493
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO REORGANIZE AND STRENGTHEN THE COOPERATIVE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, REPEALING FOR THIS PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6939, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE CHARTER OF THE COOPERATIVE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to make the Cooperative Development Authority (CDA) a proactive partner of the cooperative sector by strengthening its development and regulatory powers to ensure that the Authority will be more responsive to the challenges of the future.

name: HBN-00494
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING ARTICLES 155 AND 157 OF EXECUTIVE ORDER NO. 209 AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE FAMILY CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES, SO AS TO STRENGTHEN THE PROVISIONS OF THE LAW GOVERNING THE FAMILY HOME
congress_website_abstract: Amends certain provisions of the Family Code of the Philippines, among them the provision on the value of the real property and the high cost of adequate shelter, increasing the value attached to the family home to conform it with present day economic realities, if only to give full meaning to the spirit of the law.

name: HBN-00495
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE TOLL REGULATORY BOARD TO CONDUCT PUBLIC HEARINGS PRIOR TO THE APPROVAL OF TOLL RATES OR ANY INCREASE THEREIN, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NUMBERED EIGHTEEN HUNDRED NINETY-FOUR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to require the Toll Regulatory Board (TRB) to conduct public hearings prior to the approval of initial toll rates of any such infrastructure that may yet be constructed, or any proposal tom increase the toll rates of the existing ones.

name: HBN-00496
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING CIVIL SERVICE ELIGIBILITY TO CONTRACTUAL AND CO-TERMINOUS GOVERNMENT EMPLOYEES WHO HAVE RENDERED A TOTAL OF FIVE (5) YEARS OF EFFICIENT SERVICE, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Grants civil service eligibility to contractual or co-terminus government employees who have rendered a total of five (5) years of efficient service.

name: HBN-00497
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED EIGHTY-FOUR HUNDRED NINETY-TWO, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE NATIONAL MUSEUM ACT
congress_website_abstract: Authorizes the National Museum to use part of its income to augment the financial requirements of its operations.

name: HBN-00498
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE MEDICAL TOURISM BUREAU WITHIN THE DEPARTMENT OF TOURISM, DEFINING ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Establishes a bureau in the government whose task will be to properly and adequately address the needs of foreign tourists as well as Filipino balikbayans and overseas Filipino workers seeking medical treatment in the country, and of the private sector seeking to provide the services for those needs.

name: HBN-00499
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING TRAVEL ALLOWANCES TO BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7883, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS 'THE BARANGAY HEALTH WORKERS' BENEFITS AND INCENTIVES ACT OF 1995,' AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to grant travel allowances to barangay health workers to aid in the fulfillment of their duties.

name: HBN-00500
congress_website_title: AN ACT GRANTING FRANKING PRIVILEGES TO SANGGUNIANG BARANGAYS
congress_website_abstract: Grants exemption to Sangguniang Barangay from the payment of postage on any mail matter they send to government agencies and officials, both local and national, provided that his exemption will only be available to assist and expedite the conduct of the official businesses, activities and duties of the Sangguniang Barangays and will not be utilized for matters which are purely personal or politically partisan.

name: HBN-00501
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO STRENGTHEN THE LAGUNA LAKE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY (LLDA), THEREBY REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4850, AS AMENDED, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE LAGUNA LAKE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY ACT OF 1966, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

name: HBN-00502
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING DISCRIMINATION IN THE HIRING OF EMPLOYEES OR WORKERS IN GENERAL WITH REGARD TO THEIR AGE AND EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTION FROM WHICH THEY EARNED THEIR DEGREES, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Prohibits Employers to refuse to hire prospective employees or workers for reason of age, unless such age is inimical to the work to be performed, or educational institution from which they graduated.

name: HBN-00523
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A REWARDS FOR INFORMATION CONCERNING TERRORISM PROGRAM AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide a reward system for persons who provide information leading to the arrest or prosecution of terrorist or the prevention of terrorist act.

name: HBN-00524
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A REWARDS PROGRAM FOR INFORMATION ON POLITICAL KILLINGS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide a reward system for persons who provide information leading to the arrest or prosecution of those involved in political killings.

name: HBN-00525
congress_website_title: AN ACT REQUIRING THE REGISTRATION OF THE PRE-PAID SIM CARD USERS AND MOBILE PHONE UNITS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to require public telecommunications entities (PTEs) to establish a foolproof system of identifying users/or purchases of pre-paid Subscriber Identification Module (SIM) cards in order to put a stop to the brazen theft of mobile phone units which have become an indispensable communication tool to everyone.

name: HBN-00526
congress_website_title: AN ACT REGULATING THE INSTALLATION AND MAINTENANCE OF CHECKPOINTS
congress_website_abstract: Regulates the installation and maintenance of checkpoints in order to abate, if not totally stop, untoward incidents that occur in checkpoints that violate the basic rights of our people.

name: HBN-00527
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROHIBITING AND PENALIZING THE UNAUTHORIZED POSSESSION AND USE OF OFFICIAL LETTERHEADS AND STATIONERY BELONGING TO DIFFERENT NATIONAL GOVERNMENT AGENCIES, OFFICES OR ENTITIES, AND PROVIDING PENALTIES THERETO
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to criminalize the unauthorized possession as well as unauthorized use of official letterheads and stationeries by any private individual and more so, by public officials and employees for their own personal gains or that of others.

name: HBN-00528
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN SECTIONS OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4200, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS \"AN ACT TO PROHIBIT AND PENALIZE WIRE TAPPING AND OTHER RELATED VIOLATIONS OF THE PRIVACY OF COMMUNICATION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES\" BY INCREASING THE PENALTIES PROVIDED THEREIN AND REGULATING THE OWNERSHIP, POSSESSION, SALE, IMPORTATION AND USE OF WIRETAPPING DEVICES, PROVIDING PENALTIES FOR VIOLATIONS THEREOF, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to increase the penalties wiretapping and other related violations of the privacy of communication and regulate the ownership, possession, sale, importation and use of wiretapping devices.

name: HBN-00529
congress_website_title: AN ACT FURTHER AMENDING SECTIONS 3 AND 17 OF PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1638 ENTITLED \"AN ACT ESTABLISHING A NEW SYSTEM OF RETIREMENT AND SEPARATION FOR MILITARY PERSONNEL OF THE ARMED FORCES OF THE PHILIPPINES\", AS AMENDED BY PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1650, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides an opportunity to interested individuals who have previously rendered civilian service prior to their joining the AFP to further serve the military establishment by giving them option to include or exclude said civilian service to their military service for the purpose of retirement.

name: HBN-00530
congress_website_title: AN ACT DEFINING THE VISION AND POLICIES OF GOVERNMENT IN THE HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT SECTOR, CREATING THE DEPARTMENT OF HOUSING AND URBAN DEVELOPMENT, DEFINING ITS MANDATE, POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Proposes to create a Department of Housing and Urban Development, the primary government agency that will facilitate and ensure the availability of affordable housing to our people, especially those who need it most.

name: HBN-00531
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A LOCAL HOUSING BOARD IN ALL CITIES AND FIRST TO THIRD CLASS MUNICIPALITIES, PROVIDING FOR ITS POWERS AND FUNCTIONS, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to create a specialized body, a local housing board, in all cities and first to third class municipalities that shall ensure the faithful and proactive execution of housing programs at the local levels.

name: HBN-00532
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROVIDE ADDITIONAL PROTECTION TO BUYERS OF REAL ESTATE ON INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS BY REQUIRING SUBDIVISION OR REAL ESTATE OWNERS TO HAVE AN INDIVIDUAL TITLE ON EVERY LOT AVAILABLE FIRST BEFORE OFFERING THE SAME FOR SALE, PROHIBITING ANY MORTGAGE, LIEN OR ENCUMBRANCE ON THE SAME, MAKING THE ANNOTATION ON THE TITLE OF THE CONTRACT TO SELL OR SALE MANDATORY, MAKING IT COMPULSORY FOR THE EXECUTION OF A DEED OF ABSOLUTE SALE AND THE DELIVERY OF THE TITLE TO THE BUYER UPON COMPLETION OF INSTALLMENT PAYMENTS, AND PROVIDING OTHER PROTECTIVE MEASURES, INCLUDING THE IMPOSITION OF PENALTY FOR VIOLATION THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Requires subdivision or real estate owners to have an individual title on every lot available first before offering the same for sale, prohibiting any mortgage, lien or encumbrance on the same, making the annotation on the title of the contract to sell or sale mandatory, making it compulsory for the execution of a deed of absolute sale and the delivery of the title to the buyer upon completion of installment payments.

name: HBN-00533
congress_website_title: AN ACT PRESCRIBING THE MECHANISMS TO FACILITATE THE DISPOSITION OF GOVERNMENT-OWNED LANDS FOR SOCIALIZED HOUSING
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to prescribe the mechanisms to facilitate the disposition of government-owned lands for socialized housing, and to mandate that at least ten percent (10%) of the proceeds of the sale of government-owned lands to private individuals or entities shall be set aside for the development of socialized housing projects within, adjacent to the affected areas or in nearby areas within the city or municipality concerned.

name: HBN-00534
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING A MARITIME COURT FOR THE PURPOSE OF ADJUDICATION OF ADMIRALTY DISPUTES OCCURRING WITHIN PHILIPPINE WATERS
congress_website_abstract: Establishes a specialized maritime court for the purpose of adjudication of admiralty disputes occurring within the Philippine waters.

name: HBN-00535
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO ORDAIN AND INSTITUTE A MARITIME CODE OF THE PHILIPPINES

name: HBN-00536
congress_website_title: AN ACT CONSOLIDATING ADMIRALTY AND MARITIME LAWS TO MODERNIZE THE MARITIME INDUSTRY, PROMOTE AND REGULATE MERCHANT MARINE ACTIVITIES, RATIONALIZE THE ORGANIZATION AND FUNCTIONS OF GOVERNMENT AGENCIES RELATED TO ADMIRALTY AND MARITIME MATTERS, AND ENSURE THE PROTECTION OF THE MARINE WEALTH IN THE PHILIPPINE TERRITORY

name: HBN-00537
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A STRATEGIC FOOD SECURITY RICE RESERVE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to establish a strategic food security and rice reserve with the primordial objective of assuring a steady and ample supply of rice at affordable prices, especially in times of disaster and calamities.

name: HBN-00538
congress_website_title: AN ACT TO PROMOTE THE AGRICULTURE INDUSTRY, STABILIZE PRICES OF AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTS AND ENHANCE FOOD SECURITY THROUGH THE EFFECTIVE PRODUCTION, PROCESSING, MARKETING AND DISTRIBUTION OF AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTS, RATIONALIZING AND RESTRUCTURING FOR THE PURPOSE, ALL EXISTING GOVERNMENT ORGANIZATIONS IN AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION, DISTRIBUTION MARKETING AND OTHER SUPPORT PROGRAMS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Rationalizes and restructures the existing government organizations in order to establish harmony and coordination between policy-making and implementation and market development programs geared towards supporting the farmer as he transforms himself into an entrepreneur.

name: HBN-00539
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE SLOPING AGRICULTURAL LAND TECHNOLOGY FARMING PROGRAM, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFORE AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Establishes the Sloping Agricultural Land Technology (SALT) involving diversified crop production and soil and water conservation measures as the more appropriate program for the Philippine hillsides and mountainsides that will yield substantial benefits to marginalized upland families who would derive higher income from their crops.

name: HBN-00540
title: LTO DISTRICT OFFICE (CITY OF IMUS, CAVITE)
long_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A DISTRICT OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) IN THE CITY OF BACOOR, PROVINCE OF CAVITE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING A DISTRICT OFFICE OF THE LAND TRANSPORTATION OFFICE (LTO) IN THE CITY OF BACOOR, CAVITE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

name: HBN-00541
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING MEASURES TO ENSURE THE SAFETY OF CHILDREN ABOARD MOTORCYCLES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Provides measures to ensure safety of motorcycle passengers, especially children, at all times, by regulating the operation of motorcycles along roads and highways.

name: HBN-00542
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A THREE THOUSAND PESO (PHP3,000.00) INCREASE IN THE MONTHLY PENSION OF WAR VETERANS AND THEIR DEPENDENTS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Increases the monthly pension of all Filipino War Veterans by Three Thousand Pesos (P3,000.000) across the board.

name: HBN-00463
congress_website_title: AN ACT RECOGNIZING THE COOPERATIVE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY, REPEALING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6939, CREATING THE COOPERATIVE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY
congress_website_abstract: Transfers the Cooperatives Development Authority to the Office of the President as an attached agency for policy and program coordination.

name: HBN-00464
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CREATION, ORGANIZATION AND OPERATION OF COOPERATIVE BANKS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to transform cooperatives into entities which are more useful and relevant by encouraging and assisting these in the establishment of cooperative banks in order to make credit facilities available and readily accessible to small farmers, fisherfolks and members of other marginalized sectors on reasonable terms.

name: HBN-00465
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR A WHOLISTIC PROGRAM FOR AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT WORKERS AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to affirm the rights of agricultural workers with provisions for their career development as a way of acknowledging their important role in agricultural modernization.

name: HBN-00466
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE CONDONATION OF UNPAID INTERESTS, PENALTIES AND SURCHARGES ON LOANS SECURED BY FARMERS, FISHERFOLK AND AGRARIAN REFORM BENEFICIARIES FROM THE DEPARTMENT OF AGRARIAN REFORM (DAR), THE DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE (DA), THE PEOPLE'S CREDIT AND FINANCE CORPORATION (PCFC) THE COOPERATIVE DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY (CDA), THE NATIONAL FOOD AUTHORITY (NFA) AND THE QUEDAN AND RURAL CREDIT GUARANTEE CORPORATION (QUEDANCOR)
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide small farmers and fisherfolks accessible facilities in terms of acquiring new loans and other support from the government financial institutions.

name: HBN-00467
congress_website_title: AN ACT PROMOTING CORPORATE FARMING AND PROVIDING INCENTIVES THEREOF
congress_website_abstract: Explains that corporate farming´s unique advantage is its ability to vertically integrate the entire process of food production and offers more efficient and effective management not only of the farm itself, but also the entire chain of agriculture-related business, including seed supply, agrochemicals, food processing, machinery, storage, transport, distribution, marketing, advertising, and retail sales.

name: HBN-00468
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PHILIPPINE LAKES RESOURCES DEVELOPMENT AND MANAGEMENT COUNCIL AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to formulate a common and comprehensive development framework of the country´s lakes, a framework that should encompass regulation of economic and other uses of lakes; protection and conservation of lake resources and ecosystems; and management and governance, thus the creation and establishment of Philippine Lake Resources Development and Management Council (PLRDMC).

name: HBN-00469
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING THE PHILIPPINE CROP INSURANCE CORPORATION, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE PRESIDENTIAL DECREE NO. 1467 AS AMENDED
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to address the present realities concerning changing climate patterns that damage agricultural crops thus causing economic dislocations among marginalized farmers and fisherfolks.

name: HBN-00470
congress_website_title: AN ACT DECLARING MAY 15 OF EACH YEAR AS NATIONAL FARMERS AND FISHERFOLK DAY

name: HBN-00471
congress_website_title: AN ACT STRENGTHENING AND INSTITUTIONALIZING CREDIT, GUARANTEE AND INSURANCE SUPPORT OF THE LAND BANK OF THE PHILIPPINES TO AGRARIAN REFORM BENEFICIARIES, SMALL FARMERS AND FISHERFOLK, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE, CHAPTER IV OF REPUBLIC ACT 3844 ALSO KNOWN AS THE AGRICULTURAL LAND REFORM CODE
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to provide for greater accessibility to financial support for small farmers and fisherfolks, their organizations and associations.

name: HBN-00472
congress_website_title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING THE STATE AGRICULTURAL GUARANTEE AND INSURANCE PROTECTION FUNDS (SAGIP FUNDS), CREATING THE STATE AGRICULTURAL GUARANTEE AND INSURANCE PROTECTION CORPORATION (SAGIPCO.), DEFINING ITS OBJECTIVES, POWERS, FUNCTIONS, PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to establish a one-stop-shop for the acquisition and processing of loans and insurance package for small farmers and fisherfolk and their organizations as well as provide for an integrated model that integrates all instruments for farmers and fisherfolk support.

name: HBN-00473
congress_website_title: AN ACT CREATING THE PHILIPPINE FRUITS INDUSTRY AND TRADE AUTHORITY, VESTING IT WITH REGULATORY POWERS AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS FOR THE PURPOSE
congress_website_abstract: Seeks to consolidate the efforts of the government and the private sector in developing the Philippine fruits industry and trade so that its full potential can be realized.

name: HBN-00474
congress_website_title: AN ACT AMENDING SECTIONS 27 AND 71 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6657, OTHERWISE KNOWN AS THE COMPREHENSIVE AGRARIAN REFORM LAW OF 1998 THEREBY LIFTING THE RESTRICTION ON THE RIGHT OF FARMER-BENEFICIARIES TO MORTGAGE AND/OR ENCUMBER THE LANDS AWARDED TO THEM UNDER THE COMPREHENSIVE AGRARIAN REFORM PROGRAM AND ALLOWING THE SUBMISSION OF THE CERTIFICATE OF LAND OWNERSHIP AWARD AS SUFFICIENT COLLATERAL FOR LOANS ENTERED INTO WITH BANKS AND/OR FINANCIAL INTERMEDIARIES
congress_website_abstract: Lifts the restrictions in the Comprehensive Agrarian Reform Law that prohibits farm workers from using the lands awarded to them as collateral for any loan transaction, thus enhancing their chances of gaining credit to equip them with the necessary tools to improve their living conditions.

name: HBN-00475
congress_website_title: AN ACT RATIONALIZING AGRICULTURE EDUCATION IN THE PHILIPPINES BY ESTABLISHING A NATIONAL SYSTEM OF AGRICULTURE EDUCATION INSTITUTIONS, PROVIDING FOR MECHANISMS OF IMPLEMENTATION, AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
